// 例如: { type: 'doc', content: [{ type: 'paragraph', content: [...] }] }

// 获取内容数组
editor.getJSON().content;

// 获取选中内容
editor.state.selection.empty;  // 是否有选中
editor.state.selection.content().content;  // 选中内容

// ==================== 内容设置 ====================

// 插入内容
editor.commands.insertContent('<h1>Title</h1>');
editor.commands.insertContent({ type: 'heading', attrs: { level: 1 }, content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Title' }] });

// 设置内容（替换）
editor.commands.setContent('<p>New Content</p>');
editor.commands.setContent(null);  // 清空内容

// 清空内容
editor.commands.clearContent();

// 设置为空段落
editor.commands.setEmpty();

// ==================== 格式设置 ====================

// 文本格式
editor.chain().focus().toggleBold().run();         // 加粗
editor.chain().focus().toggleItalic().run();      // 斜体
editor.chain().focus().toggleStrike().run();      // 删除线
editor.chain().focus().toggleCode().run();         // 行内代码
editor.chain().focus().toggleHighlight().run();   // 高亮
editor.chain().focus().toggleUnderline().run();   // 下划线（需安装扩展）

// 清除格式
editor.chain().focus().unsetAllMarks().run();      // 清除所有标记
editor.chain().focus().clearNodes().run();         // 清除节点

// 标题
editor.chain().focus().toggleHeading({ level: 1 }).run();  // H1
editor.chain().focus().toggleHeading({ level: 2 }).run();  // H2
editor.chain().focus().toggleHeading({ level: 3 }).run();  // H3

// 段落
editor.chain().focus().setParagraph().run();       // 设置为段落

// ==================== 列表操作 ====================

// 无序列表
editor.chain().focus().toggleBulletList().run();

// 有序列表
editor.chain().focus().toggleOrderedList().run();

// 任务列表
editor.chain().focus().toggleTaskList().run();

// 缩进
editor.chain().focus().sinkListItem('listItem').run();
editor.chain().focus().liftListItem('listItem').run();

// ==================== 代码块 ====================

// 切换代码块
editor.chain().focus().toggleCodeBlock().run();

// 代码块语言选择（需要在 CodeBlock 扩展中配置）
editor.chain().focus().toggleCodeBlock({ language: 'javascript' }).run();

// ==================== 撤销重做 ====================

// 撤销
editor.chain().focus().undo().run();

// 重做
editor.chain().focus().redo().run();

// 检查是否可以撤销/重做
editor.can().chain().focus().undo().run();
editor.can().chain().focus().redo().run();

// ==================== 选中与光标 ====================

// 设置光标位置
editor.commands.setTextSelection(5);

// 选中指定范围
editor.commands.setSelection(from, to);

// 聚焦到末尾
editor.commands.focus('end');

// 聚焦到开头
editor.commands.focus('start');

// 选中全部
editor.commands.selectAll();

// ==================== 插入特殊内容 ====================

// 插入图片
editor.chain().focus().setImage({ src: 'image-url.jpg', alt: '描述' }).run();

// 插入链接
editor.chain().focus().setLink({ href: 'https://example.com' }).run();

// 移除链接
editor.chain().focus().unsetLink().run();

// 插入水平线
editor.chain().focus().setHorizontalRule().run();

// 插入硬换行
editor.chain().focus().setHardBreak().run();

// ==================== 表格操作 ====================

// 插入表格
editor.chain().focus().insertTable({ rows: 3, cols: 3, withHeaderRow: true }).run();

// 删除表格
editor.chain().focus().deleteTable().run();

// 添加行
editor.chain().focus().addRowAfter().run();
editor.chain().focus().addRowBefore().run();

// 删除行
editor.chain().focus().deleteRow().run();

// 添加列
editor.chain().focus().addColumnAfter().run();
editor.chain().focus().addColumnBefore().run();

// 删除列
editor.chain().focus().deleteColumn().run();

// 合并/拆分单元格
editor.chain().focus().mergeCells().run();
editor.chain().focus().splitCell().run();

// ==================== 状态检查 ====================

// 检查格式是否激活
editor.isActive('bold');           // 是否加粗
editor.isActive('italic');         // 是否斜体
editor.isActive('heading', { level: 1 });  // 是否 H1
editor.isActive('bulletList');     // 是否无序列表
editor.isActive('link', { href: 'https://...' });  // 是否特定链接

// 获取编辑器属性
editor.isEditable();               // 是否可编辑
editor.isEmpty();                  // 是否为空
协作功能实现
import Collaboration from '@tiptap/extension-collaboration';
import CollaborationCursor from '@tiptap/extension-collaboration-cursor';
import * as Y from 'yjs';
import { WebsocketProvider } from 'y-websocket';

// 创建 Yjs 文档
const ydoc = new Y.Doc();

// 创建 WebSocket Provider
const provider = new WebsocketProvider(
  'wss://demos.yjs.dev',    // 服务器地址
  'room-name',               // 房间名
  ydoc
);

// 创建协作编辑器
function CollaborativeEditor() {
  const editor = useEditor({
    extensions: [
      // 基础扩展
      StarterKit.configure({
        // 禁用默认历史，使用 Yjs 的 UndoManager
        history: false,
      }),

      // 协作扩展
      Collaboration.configure({
        document: ydoc,
      }),

      // 协作光标扩展
      CollaborationCursor.configure({
        provider: provider,
        user: {
          name: '用户名',
          color: '#f783ac',
        },
      }),
    ],

    content: '',

    // 协作编辑器通常禁用本地撤销
    editable: true,
  });

  return editor;
}

// ==================== 监听用户状态 ====================

// 获取所有在线用户
const getOnlineUsers = () => {
  const states = provider.awareness.getStates();
  const users = [];
  states.forEach((state, clientId) => {
    if (state.user) {
      users.push({
        clientId,
        ...state.user,
      });
    }
  });
  return users;
};

// 监听用户变化
provider.awareness.on('change', () => {
  console.log('在线用户:', getOnlineUsers());
});
工具栏实现示例
// 工具栏组件
function EditorToolbar({ editor }) {
  if (!editor) return null;

  const ToolbarButton = ({ onClick, isActive, children, title }) => (
    <button
      onClick={onClick}
      className={`toolbar-btn ${isActive ? 'active' : ''}`}
      title={title}
      type="button"
    >
      {children}
    </button>
  );

  return (
    <div className="toolbar">
      {/* 文本格式 */}
      <ToolbarButton
        onClick={() => editor.chain().focus().toggleBold().run()}
        isActive={editor.isActive('bold')}
        title="加粗"
      >
        B
      </ToolbarButton>

      <ToolbarButton
        onClick={() => editor.chain().focus().toggleItalic().run()}
        isActive={editor.isActive('italic')}
        title="斜体"
      >
        I
      </ToolbarButton>

      <ToolbarButton
        onClick={() => editor.chain().focus().toggleStrike().run()}
        isActive={editor.isActive('strike')}
        title="删除线"
      >
        S
      </ToolbarButton>

      {/* 标题 */}
      <select
        value={
          editor.isActive('heading', { level: 1 }) ? '1' :
          editor.isActive('heading', { level: 2 }) ? '2' :
          editor.isActive('heading', { level: 3 }) ? '3' : '0'
        }
        onChange={(e) => {
          const level = parseInt(e.target.value);
          if (level === 0) {
            editor.chain().focus().setParagraph().run();
          } else {
            editor.chain().focus().toggleHeading({ level }).run();
          }
        }}
      >
        <option value="0">段落</option>
        <option value="1">标题 1</option>
        <option value="2">标题 2</option>
        <option value="3">标题 3</option>
      </select>

      {/* 列表 */}
      <ToolbarButton
        onClick={() => editor.chain().focus().toggleBulletList().run()}
        isActive={editor.isActive('bulletList')}
        title="无序列表"
      >
        UL
      </ToolbarButton>

      <ToolbarButton
        onClick={() => editor.chain().focus().toggleOrderedList().run()}
        isActive={editor.isActive('orderedList')}
        title="有序列表"
      >
        OL
      </ToolbarButton>

      {/* 代码块 */}
      <ToolbarButton
        onClick={() => editor.chain().focus().toggleCodeBlock().run()}
        isActive={editor.isActive('codeBlock')}
        title="代码块"
      >
        {'</>'}
      </ToolbarButton>

      {/* 撤销重做 */}
      <ToolbarButton
        onClick={() => editor.chain().focus().undo().run()}
        isActive={false}
        title="撤销"
      >
        Undo
      </ToolbarButton>

      <ToolbarButton
        onClick={() => editor.chain().focus().redo().run()}
        isActive={false}
        title="重做"
      >
        Redo
      </ToolbarButton>

      {/* 链接 */}
      <ToolbarButton
        onClick={() => {
          const url = window.prompt('输入链接地址:');
          if (url) {
            editor.chain().focus().setLink({ href: url }).run();
          }
        }}
        isActive={editor.isActive('link')}
        title="链接"
      >
        Link
      </ToolbarButton>
    </div>
  );
}

// 完整编辑器组件
function FullEditor() {
  const editor = useEditor({
    extensions: [StarterKit],
    content: '<p>Hello TipTap!</p>',
  });

  return (
    <div className="editor-container">
      <EditorToolbar editor={editor} />
      <EditorContent editor={editor} />
    </div>
  );
}
自定义节点示例
import { Node, mergeAttributes } from '@tiptap/core';
import { ReactNodeViewRenderer } from '@tiptap/react';

// 自定义组件示例
const CustomComponent = Node.create({
  name: 'customComponent',

  // 块级元素
  group: 'block',

  // 原子节点（不能编辑内部）
  atom: true,

  // 属性定义
  addAttributes() {
    return {
      type: {
        default: 'info',
      },
      count: {
        default: 0,
      },
    };
  },

  // HTML 解析规则
  parseHTML() {
    return [
      { tag: 'my-component' },
      { tag: 'div[data-type="custom-component"]' },
    ];
  },

  // HTML 渲染
  renderHTML({ HTMLAttributes }) {
    return ['my-component', mergeAttributes(HTMLAttributes), 0];
  },

  // 节点视图（React 组件）
  addNodeViews() {
    return ReactNodeViewRenderer(Component);
  },

  // 命令
  addCommands() {
    return {
      setCustomComponent:
        (attributes) =>
        ({ commands }) => {
          return commands.insertContent({
            type: this.name,
            attrs: attributes,
          });
        },
    };
  },
});

// 在编辑器中使用
function useCustomExtensionEditor() {
  const editor = useEditor({
    extensions: [
      StarterKit,
      CustomComponent,
    ],
  });

  // 插入自定义组件
  const insertComponent = () => {
    editor.chain().focus().setCustomComponent({ type: 'info', count: 1 }).run();
  };

  return { editor, insertComponent };
}
常见配置选项
// useEditor 配置选项
const editor = useEditor({
  // 扩展
  extensions: [],

  // 初始内容
  content: '<p>Initial content</p>',

  // 内容（响应式）
  // content: useMemo(() => '<p>Content</p>', []),

  // 是否可编辑
  editable: true,

  // 编辑器属性
  editorProps: {
    attributes: {
      class: 'prose max-w-none',
    },
    handleKeyDown: (view, event) => {
      // 自定义键盘事件处理
      return false; // false 表示不阻止默认行为
    },
  },

  // 焦点策略
  // 'start' | 'end' | 'all' | false
  autofocus: 'end',

  // 自动保存（协作时常用）
  immediatelyRender: false,

  // 注射全局 CSS
  injectCSS: true,

  // 内容只读时的处理
  editable: () => boolean,
});

// StarterKit 配置
StarterKit.configure({
  // 启用/禁用各个功能
  document: false,
  paragraph: true,
  heading: { levels: [1, 2, 3] },
  blockquote: true,
  bulletList: true,
  orderedList: true,
  codeBlock: true,
  code: true,
  horizontalRule: true,
  dropcursor: true,
  gapcursor: true,
  history: true,
});

// Placeholder 配置
Placeholder.configure({
  placeholder: 'Write something...',
  placeholderWhenEmpty: false,
  placeholderIsTip: false,
});

// Link 配置
Link.configure({
  protocols: ['http', 'https', 'mailto:', 'tel:'],
  autolink: true,
  openOnClick: true,
  linkOnPaste: true,
  HTMLAttributes: {
    class: 'link',
  },
});

5.3.7 Yjs + Socket.io 多人协作文档完整实现

以下提供完整的 Yjs + Socket.io 多人协作文档实现，包括服务端、客户端和编辑器集成的详细代码。

完整服务端实现（NestJS）
// 服务端 (NestJS)
import {
  WebSocketGateway,
  WebSocketServer,
  SubscribeMessage,
  OnGatewayConnection,
  OnGatewayDisconnect,
} from '@nestjs/websockets';
import { Server, Socket } from 'socket.io';
import * as Y from 'yjs';

@WebSocketGateway({
  cors: { origin: '*' },
  namespace: '/collab',
})
export class CollaborationGateway implements OnGatewayConnection, OnGatewayDisconnect {
  @WebSocketServer()
  server: Server;

  // 存储每个房间的 Yjs 文档
  private docs = new Map<string, Y.Doc>();

  // 存储活跃用户
  private userColors = [
    '#f783ac', '#fc8181', '#f6ad55', '#68d391',
    '#63b3ed', '#7f9cf5', '#a78bfa', '#f687b3',
  ];

  handleConnection(client: Socket) {
    console.log(`Client connected: ${client.id}`);
  }

  handleDisconnect(client: Socket) {
    console.log(`Client disconnected: ${client.id}`);
    // 清理用户数据
    client.rooms.forEach(room => {
      client.to(room).emit('user-left', { id: client.id });
    });
  }

  // 用户加入房间
  @SubscribeMessage('join-room')
  handleJoinRoom(client: Socket, payload: { roomId: string; userName: string }) {
    const { roomId, userName } = payload;
    const room = `room:${roomId}`;

    // 加入 Socket 房间
    client.join(room);

    // 获取或创建 Yjs 文档
    let doc = this.docs.get(roomId);
    if (!doc) {
      doc = new Y.Doc();
      this.docs.set(roomId, doc);
    }

    // 分配用户颜色
    const colorIndex = client.id.charCodeAt(0) % this.userColors.length;
    const userColor = this.userColors[colorIndex];

    // 初始化用户状态
    client.data = {
      roomId,
      userName,
      color: userColor,
    };

    // 通知其他用户有新用户加入
    client.to(room).emit('user-joined', {
      id: client.id,
      name: userName,
      color: userColor,
    });

    // 返回初始化数据
    return {
      docState: Y.encodeStateAsUpdate(doc),
      users: this.getRoomUsers(room),
      userId: client.id,
      userColor,
    };
  }

  // 同步 Yjs 更新
  @SubscribeMessage('sync-update')
  handleSyncUpdate(
    client: Socket,
    payload: { roomId: string; update: Uint8Array },
  ) {
    const { roomId, update } = payload;
    const room = `room:${roomId}`;
    const doc = this.docs.get(roomId);

    if (doc) {
      // 应用更新到 Yjs 文档
      Y.applyUpdate(doc, update);

      // 广播给房间内其他用户
      client.to(room).emit('remote-update', {
        update,
        userId: client.id,
      });
    }
  }

  // 感知光标位置
  @SubscribeMessage('cursor-update')
  handleCursorUpdate(
    client: Socket,
    payload: { roomId: string; cursor: { x: number; y: number } },
  ) {
    const { roomId, cursor } = payload;
    const room = `room:${roomId}`;

    // 广播光标位置
    client.to(room).emit('remote-cursor', {
      userId: client.id,
      userName: client.data?.userName,
      color: client.data?.color,
      cursor,
    });
  }

  // 感知用户选中区域
  @SubscribeMessage('selection-update')
  handleSelectionUpdate(
    client: Socket,
    payload: { roomId: string; selection: { from: number; to: number } },
  ) {
    const { roomId, selection } = payload;
    const room = `room:${roomId}`;

    client.to(room).emit('remote-selection', {
      userId: client.id,
      userName: client.data?.userName,
      color: client.data?.color,
      selection,
    });
  }

  // 离开房间
  @SubscribeMessage('leave-room')
  handleLeaveRoom(client: Socket, payload: { roomId: string }) {
    const { roomId } = payload;
    const room = `room:${roomId}`;

    client.leave(room);
    client.to(room).emit('user-left', {
      id: client.id,
      name: client.data?.userName,
    });
  }

  private getRoomUsers(room: string) {
    const roomSockets = this.server.sockets.adapter.rooms.get(room);
    if (!roomSockets) return [];

    return Array.from(roomSockets).map(id => {
      const socket = this.server.sockets.sockets.get(id);
      return {
        id,
        name: socket?.data?.userName || 'Anonymous',
        color: socket?.data?.color || '#888',
      };
    });
  }
}

面试考察点：

  • Socket.io 房间管理机制
  • Yjs 文档状态同步原理
  • WebSocket 长连接维护
  • 用户状态与房间隔离
完整客户端实现
// 客户端协作文档组件
import React, { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
import { io, Socket } from 'socket.io-client';
import * as Y from 'yjs';

interface UseCollaborationOptions {
  roomId: string;
  userName: string;
  onUsersChange?: (users: User[]) => void;
  onRemoteUpdate?: (update: Uint8Array) => void;
}

interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  color: string;
  cursor?: { x: number; y: number };
  selection?: { from: number; to: number };
}

export function useCollaboration({
  roomId,
  userName,
  onUsersChange,
  onRemoteUpdate,
}: UseCollaborationOptions) {
  const [socket, setSocket] = useState<Socket | null>(null);
  const [ydoc] = useState(() => new Y.Doc());
  const [users, setUsers] = useState<User[]>([]);
  const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
  const userIdRef = useRef<string>('');

  // 初始化连接
  useEffect(() => {
    const newSocket = io('/collab', {
      transports: ['websocket', 'polling'],
      reconnection: true,
      reconnectionAttempts: 5,
      reconnectionDelay: 1000,
    });

    newSocket.on('connect', () => {
      console.log('Socket connected');
      setIsConnected(true);

      // 加入房间
      newSocket.emit('join-room', { roomId, userName });
    });

    newSocket.on('disconnect', () => {
      console.log('Socket disconnected');
      setIsConnected(false);
    });

    // 用户列表更新
    newSocket.on('init-users', (roomUsers: User[]) => {
      setUsers(roomUsers);
      onUsersChange?.(roomUsers);
    });

    newSocket.on('user-joined', (user: User) => {
      setUsers(prev => [...prev, user]);
      onUsersChange?.([...users, user]);
    });

    newSocket.on('user-left', ({ id }: { id: string }) => {
      setUsers(prev => prev.filter(u => u.id !== id));
      onUsersChange?.(users.filter(u => u.id !== id));
    });

    // 远程 Yjs 更新
    newSocket.on('remote-update', ({ update, userId }: { update: Uint8Array; userId: string }) => {
      // 忽略自己发的更新
      if (userId === userIdRef.current) return;

      Y.applyUpdate(ydoc, update);
      onRemoteUpdate?.(update);
    });

    // 远程光标
    newSocket.on('remote-cursor', (data: User & { cursor: { x: number; y: number } }) => {
      setUsers(prev =>
        prev.map(u => (u.id === data.userId ? { ...u, cursor: data.cursor } : u)),
      );
    });

    // 远程选中区域
    newSocket.on('remote-selection', (data: User & { selection: { from: number; to: number } }) => {
      setUsers(prev =>
        prev.map(u => (u.id === data.userId ? { ...u, selection: data.selection } : u)),
      );
    });

    setSocket(newSocket);

    return () => {
      newSocket.emit('leave-room', { roomId });
      newSocket.disconnect();
    };
  }, [roomId, userName]);

  // 同步本地更新到服务器
  const syncUpdate = useCallback(
    (update: Uint8Array) => {
      if (socket && isConnected) {
        socket.emit('sync-update', { roomId, update });
      }
    },
    [socket, roomId, isConnected],
  );

  // 监听 Yjs 变化并同步
  useEffect(() => {
    const ytext = ydoc.getText('content');

    ytext.observe(event => {
      const update = Y.encodeStateAsUpdate(ydoc);
      syncUpdate(update);
    });
  }, [ydoc, syncUpdate]);

  // 更新光标位置
  const updateCursor = useCallback(
    (cursor: { x: number; y: number }) => {
      if (socket && isConnected) {
        socket.emit('cursor-update', { roomId, cursor });
      }
    },
    [socket, roomId, isConnected],
  );

  // 更新选中区域
  const updateSelection = useCallback(
    (selection: { from: number; to: number }) => {
      if (socket && isConnected) {
        socket.emit('selection-update', { roomId, selection });
      }
    },
    [socket, roomId, isConnected],
  );

  return {
    ydoc,
    users,
    isConnected,
    updateCursor,
    updateSelection,
  };
}

面试考察点：

  • React 自定义 Hook 设计
  • Socket.io 事件机制
  • Yjs 增量更新同步
  • 闭包陷阱与解决
TipTap 协作编辑器完整集成
// TipTap 协作编辑器完整实现
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useEditor, EditorContent } from '@tiptap/react';
import StarterKit from '@tiptap/starter-kit';
import Collaboration from '@tiptap/extension-collaboration';
import CollaborationCursor from '@tiptap/extension-collaboration-cursor';
import * as Y from 'yjs';
import { WebsocketProvider } from 'y-websocket';
import Placeholder from '@tiptap/extension-placeholder';

interface CollaborativeEditorProps {
  roomId: string;
  userName: string;
}

export const CollaborativeEditor: React.FC<CollaborativeEditorProps> = ({
  roomId,
  userName,
}) => {
  const [provider, setProvider] = useState<WebsocketProvider | null>(null);
  const [ydoc] = useState(() => new Y.Doc());
  const [users, setUsers] = useState<any[]>([]);

  // 颜色生成
  const getRandomColor = () => {
    const colors = [
      '#f783ac', '#fc8181', '#f6ad55', '#68d391',
      '#63b3ed', '#7f9cf5', '#a78bfa', '#f687b3',
    ];
    return colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    // 创建 Yjs 文档 provider
    const wsProvider = new WebsocketProvider(
      'ws://localhost:3001',
      roomId,
      ydoc,
    );

    // 监听连接状态
    wsProvider.on('status', (event: { status: string }) => {
      console.log('Connection status:', event.status);
    });

    // 监听用户变化
    wsProvider.awareness.setLocalStateField('user', {
      name: userName,
      color: getRandomColor(),
    });

    wsProvider.awareness.on('change', () => {
      const states = Array.from(wsProvider.awareness.getStates().values());
      setUsers(states);
    });

    setProvider(wsProvider);

    return () => {
      wsProvider.destroy();
    };
  }, [roomId, userName, ydoc]);

  const editor = useEditor({
    extensions: [
      StarterKit.configure({
        history: false, // 禁用默认历史，用 Yjs
      }),
      Placeholder.configure({
        placeholder: '开始协作编辑...',
      }),
      Collaboration.configure({
        document: ydoc,
      }),
      CollaborationCursor.configure({
        provider: provider!,
        user: {
          name: userName,
          color: getRandomColor(),
        },
      }),
    ],
    editorProps: {
      attributes: {
        class: 'prose prose-sm sm:prose lg:prose-lg xl:prose-2xl focus:outline-none',
      },
    },
  });

  return (
    <div className="collaborative-editor">
      {/* 用户头像列表 */}
      <div className="users-list flex -space-x-2 mb-4">
        {users.map((user: any, index: number) => (
          <div
            key={index}
            className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white text-xs font-bold border-2 border-white"
            style={{ backgroundColor: user.user?.color || '#888' }}
            title={user.user?.name || 'Anonymous'}
          >
            {(user.user?.name || 'A').charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* 编辑器 */}
      <div className="editor-container border rounded-lg p-4 min-h-[300px]">
        <EditorContent editor={editor} />
      </div>

      {/* 连接状态 */}
      <div className="status mt-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
        {provider?.wsconnected ? '已连接' : '未连接'}
        {users.length > 0 && ` · ${users.length} 人在线`}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

面试考察点：

  • TipTap 扩展机制
  • Yjs 与编辑器状态同步
  • 用户感知（Awareness）协议
  • 光标实时同步原理

5.4 项目技术栈全景图

5.4.1 WebEnv-OS 技术栈

WebEnv-OS 是一个基于 Web 的虚拟操作系统项目，包含前端和后端两部分。

前端技术栈：
┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
    
┃  框架层                                                         ┃
┃  ┣━━ Next.js 14 (App Router)                               ┃
     
┃  ┣━━ React 18 + TypeScript                                 ┃
     
┃  ┗━━ Zustand (状态管理，含 persist 中间件)                   ┃
   
┃  UI 层                                                         ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ Ant Design 5 (企业级组件库)                             ┃
   
┃  ┣━━ Tailwind CSS 4 (原子化 CSS)                            ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ Framer Motion (声明式动画)                              ┃
   
┃  ┗━━ clsx + tailwind-merge (类名合并)                       ┃
    
┃  编辑器层                                                       ┃
┃  ┣━━ Monaco Editor (VS Code 同款编辑器)                      ┃
   
┃  ┣━━ @monaco-editor/react (React 集成)                      ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ TipTap (富文本编辑器，基于 ProseMirror)                ┃
    
┃  终端层                                                        ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ xterm.js (终端模拟器)                                  ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ xterm-addon-fit (自适应大小)                           ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ xterm-addon-web-links (链接点击)                       ┃
    
┃  3D/可视化层                                                  ┃
  
┃  ┣━━ Three.js (3D 渲染引擎)                                 ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ React Three Fiber (React 的 Three.js 集成)             ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ @react-three/drei (R3F 工具库)                        ┃
     
┃  ┗━━ @react-three/fiber (核心库)                            ┃
    
┃  运行时层                                                      ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ @webcontainer/api (浏览器内 Node.js 运行时)            ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ ZenFS (基于 IndexedDB 的虚拟文件系统)                   ┃
   
┃  ┗━━ WebContainer.boot() (容器启动)                         ┃
    
┃  实时通信层                                                    ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ Socket.io Client (WebSocket 客户端)                    ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ Socket.io Server (NestJS 集成)                        ┃
     
┃  ┗━━ y-websocket (Yjs 实时同步)                            ┃
     
┃  工具层                                                        ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ zustand (状态管理)                                     ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ immer (不可变状态更新)                                  ┃
   
┃  ┣━━ dayjs (日期处理)                                       ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ lodash-es (工具函数)                                   ┃
    
┗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┛
    








后端技术栈：
┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
    
┃  框架层                                                         ┃
┃  ┣━━ NestJS 10 (Node.js 企业级框架)                         ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ @nestjs/common (核心模块)                              ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ @nestjs/core (依赖注入)                               ┃
     
┃  ┗━━ @nestjs/platform-express (Express 适配器)             ┃
     
┃  数据库层                                                       ┃
┃  ┣━━ TypeORM (ORM 框架)                                     ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ SQLite (开发环境)                                      ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ PostgreSQL (生产环境)                                  ┃
    
┃  实时通信层                                                    ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ @nestjs/websockets (WebSocket 网关)                   ┃
     
┃  ┣━━ @nestjs/platform-socket.io (Socket.io 集成)           ┃
     
┃  ┗━━ socket.io (实时通信)                                   ┃
    
┃  认证层                                                        ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ Passport.js (认证中间件)                                ┃
   
┃  ┣━━ @nestjs/passport (NestJS 集成)                        ┃
     
┃  ┗━━ passport-jwt (JWT 认证)                                ┃
    
┃  工具层                                                        ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ class-validator (DTO 验证)                             ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ class-transformer (DTO 转换)                           ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ rxjs (响应式编程)                                      ┃
    
┗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┛
    





面试要点：
1. WebContainer 需要 COOP/COEP 头部
2. Monaco Editor 懒加载优化
3. Zustand 与 Immer 配合使用
4. 窗口管理器的 z-index 层级管理

5.4.2 FastDocument 技术栈

FastDocument 是一个面向团队协作的现代化文档编辑与管理平台。

前端技术栈：
┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
    
┃  框架层                                                         ┃
┃  ┣━━ Next.js 16 (App Router + 服务端渲染)                   ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ React 19                                               ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ Zustand 5 (轻量级状态管理)                             ┃
    
┃  编辑器层 (核心)                                              ┃
  
┃  ┣━━ TipTap 2.x (基于 ProseMirror 的富文本编辑器)           ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ @tiptap/react (React 集成)                             ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ @tiptap/starter-kit (基础扩展)                         ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ @tiptap/extension-collaboration (协作支持)             ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ @tiptap/extension-collaboration-cursor (协作光标)     ┃
     
┃  ┣━━ @tiptap/extension-highlight (高亮)                     ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ @tiptap/extension-task-list (任务列表)                 ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ @tiptap/extension-task-item (任务项)                   ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ @tiptap/extension-code-block (代码块)                  ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ @tiptap/extension-table (表格)                         ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ @tiptap/extension-table-row (表格行)                   ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ @tiptap/extension-table-cell (表格单元格)              ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ @tiptap/extension-table-header (表头)                 ┃
     
┃  ┣━━ @tiptap/extension-image (图片)                         ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ y-prosemirror (Yjs + ProseMirror 桥接)                ┃
     
┃  协作层 (关键)                                                 ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ Yjs (CRDT 协作引擎)                                     ┃
   
┃  ┣━━ y-websocket (WebSocket 同步)                           ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ y-indexeddb (IndexedDB 持久化)                         ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ y-prosemirror (Yjs 与 ProseMirror 集成)               ┃
     
┃  UI 层                                                         ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ Ant Design 6 (企业级 UI)                                ┃
   
┃  ┣━━ Tailwind CSS 4                                         ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ Framer Motion 12 (动画)                                ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ @ant-design/icons (图标)                               ┃
    
┃  视频会议层                                                    ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ livekit-client (LiveKit WebRTC 客户端)                 ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ livekit-server (LiveKit 服务端 SDK)                    ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ @livekit/components-react (React 组件)                ┃
     
┃  状态管理                                                      ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ Zustand 5 (全局状态)                                   ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ immer (不可变更新)                                      ┃
   
┃  ┗━━ zustand/middleware (中间件)                            ┃
    
┗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┛

┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓

┃  ┗━━ @livekit/server (视频会议服务)                          ┃
   
┃  缓存层                                                        ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ Redis 7 (高速缓存)                                     ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ ioredis (Redis 客户端)                                 ┃

┃  ┗━━ @nestjs/jwt                                           ┃
     
┗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┛

5.4.3 UnoThree 技术栈

UnoThree 是一个完整的 UNO 多人在线对战游戏项目。

前端技术栈：
┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
    
┃  框架层                                                         ┃
┃  ┣━━ Next.js 16                                             ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ React 19                                               ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ TypeScript                                             ┃
    
┃  3D 渲染层 (核心)                                             ┃
  
┃  ┣━━ Three.js 0.182 (3D 渲染引擎)                          ┃
     
┃  ┣━━ @react-three/fiber 9.5 (React Three.js 集成)         ┃
      
┃  ┣━━ @react-three/drei 10.7 (R3F 工具库)                   ┃
     
┃  ┃   ┣━━ <Canvas> (画布)                                    ┃
    
┃  ┃   ┣━━ <PerspectiveCamera> (透视相机)                     ┃
    
┃  ┃   ┣━━ <OrbitControls> (轨道控制)                         ┃
    
┃  ┃   ┣━━ <ContactShadows> (接触阴影)                       ┃
     
┃  ┃   ┣━━ <Text> (3D 文本)                                  ┃
     
┃  ┃   ┣━━ <Billboard> (公告板)                               ┃
    
┃  ┃   ┗━━ <Stars> (星空背景)                                ┃
     
┃  ┗━━ @react-three/postprocessing (后处理效果)               ┃
    
┃  2D 渲染层                                                    ┃
  
┃  ┣━━ Framer Motion 12 (声明式动画)                          ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ motion (动画组件)                                       ┃
   
┃  ┗━━ AnimatePresence (动画过渡)                             ┃
    
┃  UI 组件层                                                    ┃
  
┃  ┣━━ Ant Design 6                                           ┃
    
┃  ┣━━ Tailwind CSS 4                                         ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ clsx + tailwind-merge                                  ┃
    
┃  状态管理                                                      ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ Zustand 5                                              ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ zustand/persist (状态持久化)                           ┃
    
┃  实时通信层                                                    ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ socket.io-client 4.8                                   ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ socket.io (客户端连接)                                  ┃
   
┃  音频层                                                        ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ Web Audio API (浏览器音频)                              ┃
   
┃  ┣━━ AudioContext (音频上下文)                              ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ Howler.js (音频管理库，可选)                           ┃
    
┃  响应式适配                                                    ┃
 
┃  ┣━━ useResponsive (自定义 Hook)                            ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ window.matchMedia (媒体查询)                           ┃
    
┗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┛
    








后端技术栈：
┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓

5.4.4 技术栈速查表

类别 技术 用途 面试高频问题
框架 Next.js 14/16 SSR/SSG App Router vs Pages Router
React 18/19 UI 库 Fiber 架构、Hooks 原理
NestJS 后端框架 依赖注入、模块系统
状态管理 Zustand 轻量级状态 与 Redux 区别、persist
Immer 不可变更新 原理、使用场景
编辑器 TipTap 富文本编辑 ProseMirror 架构
Monaco Editor 代码编辑 懒加载、性能优化
协作 Yjs CRDT 协作 冲突解决、与 OT 区别
Socket.io 实时通信 房间管理、心跳
3D Three.js 3D 渲染 渲染流程、几何体
R3F React+Three 组件化开发
UI Ant Design 组件库 主题定制、Tree Shaking
Tailwind CSS 原子化 CSS 原理、 purgecss
Framer Motion 动画 AnimatePresence
构建 Webpack 模块打包 原理、loader
Vite 开发服务器 HMR、热更新
Turbopack 构建工具 与 Webpack 对比
视频 LiveKit WebRTC SFU vs MCU
WebRTC 实时通信 媒体轨道、ICE

5.4.5 项目技术选择理由

// 1. 为什么选择 Zustand 而非 Redux？
/*
Zustand 优势：
- 极简 API：create((set) => ({ count: 0 }))
- 无 Provider 嵌套：store 可以直接 import
- 灵活更新：set(state => ({ count: state.count + 1 }))
- 轻量级：体积仅 1KB
- TypeScript 支持好

适用场景：
- 中小型项目
- 需要简单状态管理
- 对性能有要求

不适用：
- 超大型项目（需要严格架构）
- 团队对 Redux 熟悉
*/

// 2. 为什么选择 TipTap 而非 Slate？
/*
TipTap 优势：
- 基于 ProseMirror（生产级）
- Yjs 原生支持协作
- 丰富的扩展生态
- 文档完善

Slate 优势：
- 更灵活的自定义
- 学习曲线陡峭但可定制性强

选择 TipTap：协作优先
选择 Slate：高度自定义需求
*/

// 3. 为什么选择 Yjs 而非 Automerge？
/*
Yjs 优势：
- 性能更好
- WebSocket 同步方案成熟
- 丰富的生态系统 (y-websocket, y-indexeddb)
- ProseMirror/Monaco 原生支持

Automerge 优势：
- API 更简洁
- 文档更好

性能对比：Yjs > Automerge
生态丰富：Yjs > Automerge
*/

// 4. 为什么选择 React Three Fiber？
/*
R3F 优势：
- React 开发范式
- 组件化思维
- 生态丰富 (@react-three/drei)
- 与 React DevTools 集成

Three.js 优势：
- 更底层控制
- 无 React 依赖

选择 R3F：熟悉 React
选择 Three.js：熟悉 3D 开发
*/

5.4.6 WebEnv-OS 桌面操作系统完整实现

以下提供 WebEnv-OS 项目的完整实现代码，包括窗口管理系统、拖拽组件、任务栏、文件资源管理器等核心模块。

窗口管理系统
// 窗口管理核心实现

// 窗口状态接口
interface WindowState {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  icon?: string;
  content: React.ReactNode;
  position: { x: number; y: number };
  size: { width: number; height: number };
  zIndex: number;
  isMinimized: boolean;
  isMaximized: boolean;
  isFullscreen: boolean;
  isFocused: boolean;
  resizable: boolean;
  draggable: boolean;
  closeable: boolean;
  minSize?: { width: number; height: number };
  maxSize?: { width: number; height: number };
}

// 窗口管理器 Hook
import { create } from 'zustand';

interface WindowManager {
  windows: WindowState[];
  activeWindowId: string | null;

  // 窗口操作
  openWindow: (window: Omit<WindowState, 'zIndex' | 'isFocused'>) => void;
  closeWindow: (id: string) => void;
  minimizeWindow: (id: string) => void;
  maximizeWindow: (id: string) => void;
  restoreWindow: (id: string) => void;

  // 窗口位置和大小
  moveWindow: (id: string, position: { x: number; y: number }) => void;
  resizeWindow: (id: string, size: { width: number; height: number }) => void;

  // 焦点管理
  focusWindow: (id: string) => void;

  // 窗口排序
  bringToFront: (id: string) => void;
  sendToBack: (id: string) => void;
}

const useWindowManager = create<WindowManager>((set, get) => ({
  windows: [],
  activeWindowId: null,

  openWindow: (windowConfig) => {
    const { windows } = get();
    const maxZIndex = Math.max(0, ...windows.map(w => w.zIndex));

    const newWindow: WindowState = {
      ...windowConfig,
      id: windowConfig.id || `window-${Date.now()}`,
      zIndex: maxZIndex + 1,
      isFocused: true,
    };

    set({
      windows: [...windows, newWindow],
      activeWindowId: newWindow.id,
    });
  },

  closeWindow: (id) => {
    const { windows, activeWindowId } = get();
    const newWindows = windows.filter(w => w.id !== id);

    // 如果关闭的是活动窗口，激活另一个
    let newActiveId = activeWindowId;
    if (activeWindowId === id) {
      const closedIndex = windows.findIndex(w => w.id === id);
      const nextWindow = newWindows[closedIndex] || newWindows[newWindows.length - 1];
      newActiveId = nextWindow?.id || null;
    }

    set({
      windows: newWindows,
      activeWindowId: newActiveId,
    });
  },

  minimizeWindow: (id) => {
    set(state => ({
      windows: state.windows.map(w =>
        w.id === id ? { ...w, isMinimized: true, isFocused: false } : w
      ),
    }));
  },

  maximizeWindow: (id) => {
    set(state => ({
      windows: state.windows.map(w =>
        w.id === id ? { ...w, isMaximized: true, isFocused: true } : w
      ),
    }));
  },

  restoreWindow: (id) => {
    set(state => ({
      windows: state.windows.map(w =>
        w.id === id ? { ...w, isMinimized: false, isMaximized: false, isFocused: true } : w
      ),
    }));
  },

  moveWindow: (id, position) => {
    set(state => ({
      windows: state.windows.map(w =>
        w.id === id ? { ...w, position } : w
      ),
    }));
  },

  resizeWindow: (id, size) => {
    set(state => ({
      windows: state.windows.map(w =>
        w.id === id ? { ...w, size } : w
      ),
    }));
  },

  focusWindow: (id) => {
    const { windows } = get();
    const maxZIndex = Math.max(0, ...windows.map(w => w.zIndex));

    set(state => ({
      windows: state.windows.map(w => ({
        ...w,
        isFocused: w.id === id,
        zIndex: w.id === id ? maxZIndex + 1 : w.zIndex,
      })),
      activeWindowId: id,
    }));
  },

  bringToFront: (id) => {
    const { windows } = get();
    const maxZIndex = Math.max(0, ...windows.map(w => w.zIndex));

    set(state => ({
      windows: state.windows.map(w =>
        w.id === id ? { ...w, zIndex: maxZIndex + 1, isFocused: true } : w
      ),
    }));
  },

  sendToBack: (id) => {
    set(state => ({
      windows: state.windows.map(w =>
        w.id === id ? { ...w, zIndex: 0 } : { ...w, zIndex: w.zIndex + 1 }
      ),
    }));
  },
}));

面试考察点：

  • Zustand 状态管理设计
  • 窗口 z-index 层级管理
  • 窗口状态机设计
  • 焦点管理策略
窗口拖拽实现
// 窗口拖拽组件实现
import React, { useRef, useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useWindowManager } from './useWindowManager';

interface DraggableWindowProps {
  window: WindowState;
  children: React.ReactNode;
}

export const DraggableWindow: React.FC<DraggableWindowProps> = ({
  window,
  children,
}) => {
  const { moveWindow, focusWindow, resizeWindow } = useWindowManager();
  const windowRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  const [isDragging, setIsDragging] = useState(false);
  const [isResizing, setIsResizing] = useState(false);
  const [resizeDirection, setResizeDirection] = useState<string>('');

  const dragStartPos = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 });
  const windowStartPos = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 });
  const windowStartSize = useRef({ width: 0, height: 0 });

  // 开始拖拽
  const handleDragStart = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    if (window.isMaximized || window.isMinimized) return;

    e.preventDefault();
    setIsDragging(true);
    focusWindow(window.id);

    dragStartPos.current = { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY };
    windowStartPos.current = { ...window.position };

    const handleMouseMove = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      const deltaX = e.clientX - dragStartPos.current.x;
      const deltaY = e.clientY - dragStartPos.current.y;

      const newX = Math.max(0, windowStartPos.current.x + deltaX);
      const newY = Math.max(0, windowStartPos.current.y + deltaY);

      moveWindow(window.id, { x: newX, y: newY });
    };

    const handleMouseUp = () => {
      setIsDragging(false);
      document.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
      document.removeEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
    };

    document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
    document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
  }, [window, focusWindow, moveWindow]);

  // 开始调整大小
  const handleResizeStart = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent, direction: string) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();

    setIsResizing(true);
    setResizeDirection(direction);
    focusWindow(window.id);

    dragStartPos.current = { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY };
    windowStartPos.current = { ...window.position };
    windowStartSize.current = { ...window.size };

    const handleMouseMove = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      const deltaX = e.clientX - dragStartPos.current.x;
      const deltaY = e.clientY - dragStartPos.current.y;

      let newWidth = windowStartSize.current.width;
      let newHeight = windowStartSize.current.height;
      let newX = windowStartPos.current.x;
      let newY = windowStartPos.current.y;

      // 根据方向调整大小
      if (direction.includes('e')) {
        newWidth = Math.max(200, windowStartSize.current.width + deltaX);
      }
      if (direction.includes('s')) {
        newHeight = Math.max(150, windowStartSize.current.height + deltaY);
      }
      if (direction.includes('w')) {
        newWidth = Math.max(200, windowStartSize.current.width - deltaX);
        newX = windowStartPos.current.x + deltaX;
      }
      if (direction.includes('n')) {
        newHeight = Math.max(150, windowStartSize.current.height - deltaY);
        newY = windowStartPos.current.y + deltaY;
      }

      resizeWindow(window.id, { width: newWidth, height: newHeight });
      if (direction.includes('w') || direction.includes('n')) {
        moveWindow(window.id, { x: newX, y: newY });
      }
    };

    const handleMouseUp = () => {
      setIsResizing(false);
      setResizeDirection('');
      document.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
      document.removeEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
    };

    document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
    document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
  }, [window, focusWindow, resizeWindow, moveWindow]);

  return (
    <div
      ref={windowRef}
      className={`window ${isDragging ? 'dragging' : ''} ${isResizing ? 'resizing' : ''}`}
      style={{
        position: 'absolute',
        left: window.position.x,
        top: window.position.y,
        width: window.size.width,
        height: window.size.height,
        zIndex: window.zIndex,
        display: window.isMinimized ? 'none' : 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
      }}
    >
      {/* 标题栏 */}
      <div
        className="window-titlebar flex items-center justify-between px-2 py-1 bg-gray-800 text-white cursor-move"
        onMouseDown={handleDragStart}
      >
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          {window.icon && <span className="text-lg">{window.icon}</span>}
          <span className="text-sm">{window.title}</span>
        </div>
        <WindowControls windowId={window.id} />
      </div>

      {/* 窗口内容 */}
      <div className="window-content flex-1 overflow-auto">
        {children}
      </div>

      {/* 调整大小手柄 */}
      {!window.isMaximized && (
        <>
          <div className="resize-handle resize-e" onMouseDown={(e) => handleResizeStart(e, 'e')} />
          <div className="resize-handle resize-s" onMouseDown={(e) => handleResizeStart(e, 's')} />
          <div className="resize-handle resize-w" onMouseDown={(e) => handleResizeStart(e, 'w')} />
          <div className="resize-handle resize-n" onMouseDown={(e) => handleResizeStart(e, 'n')} />
          <div className="resize-handle resize-se" onMouseDown={(e) => handleResizeStart(e, 'se')} />
          <div className="resize-handle resize-sw" onMouseDown={(e) => handleResizeStart(e, 'sw')} />
          <div className="resize-handle resize-ne" onMouseDown={(e) => handleResizeStart(e, 'ne')} />
          <div className="resize-handle resize-nw" onMouseDown={(e) => handleResizeStart(e, 'nw')} />
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

面试考察点：

  • 鼠标事件处理
  • 坐标计算与边界检测
  • DOM 事件委托
  • 性能优化（事件绑定位置）
任务栏实现
// 任务栏组件实现
import React, { useState, useRef } from 'react';
import { useWindowManager } from './useWindowManager';

export const Taskbar: React.FC = () => {
  const { windows, activeWindowId, focusWindow, minimizeWindow, restoreWindow } = useWindowManager();
  const [startMenuOpen, setStartMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const taskbarRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  // 开始菜单应用列表
  const startMenuApps = [
    { id: 'explorer', name: '文件资源管理器', icon: '📁' },
    { id: 'browser', name: '浏览器', icon: '🌐' },
    { id: 'vscode', name: 'VS Code', icon: '💻' },
    { id: 'terminal', name: '终端', icon: '⬛' },
    { id: 'settings', name: '设置', icon: '⚙️' },
  ];

  // 打开应用
  const openApp = (appId: string) => {
    // 触发应用打开事件
    console.log('Opening app:', appId);
    setStartMenuOpen(false);
  };

  // 点击任务栏窗口图标
  const handleTaskbarItemClick = (windowId: string) => {
    const win = windows.find(w => w.id === windowId);
    if (!win) return;

    if (win.isMinimized) {
      restoreWindow(windowId);
    } else if (win.isFocused) {
      minimizeWindow(windowId);
    } else {
      focusWindow(windowId);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div
      ref={taskbarRef}
      className="taskbar fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-12 bg-gray-900 flex items-center px-2 z-[9999]"
    >
      {/* 开始按钮 */}
      <button
        className={`start-button w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center text-2xl hover:bg-gray-700 rounded ${startMenuOpen ? 'bg-gray-700' : ''}`}
        onClick={() => setStartMenuOpen(!startMenuOpen)}
      >
        🪟
      </button>

      {/* 开始菜单 */}
      {startMenuOpen && (
        <>
          <div
            className="fixed inset-0"
            onClick={() => setStartMenuOpen(false)}
          />
          <div className="start-menu absolute bottom-14 left-2 w-64 bg-gray-800 rounded-lg shadow-xl overflow-hidden">
            <div className="pinned-apps grid grid-cols-4 gap-2 p-2">
              {startMenuApps.map(app => (
                <button
                  key={app.id}
                  className="app-button flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-2 rounded hover:bg-gray-700"
                  onClick={() => openApp(app.id)}
                >
                  <span className="text-2xl">{app.icon}</span>
                  <span className="text-xs mt-1">{app.name}</span>
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </>
      )}

      {/* 任务栏窗口列表 */}
      <div className="taskbar-items flex-1 flex items-center gap-1 ml-2 overflow-x-auto">
        {windows.map(win => (
          <button
            key={win.id}
            className={`taskbar-item flex items-center gap-2 px-3 h-9 rounded transition-colors ${
              win.id === activeWindowId && !win.isMinimized
                ? 'bg-gray-700'
                : 'hover:bg-gray-700'
            }`}
            onClick={() => handleTaskbarItemClick(win.id)}
          >
            {win.icon && <span>{win.icon}</span>}
            <span className="text-sm truncate max-w-[100px]">{win.title}</span>
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* 系统托盘 */}
      <div className="system-tray flex items-center gap-2 px-2">
        <button className="tray-icon">🔔</button>
        <button className="tray-icon">⚙️</button>
        <span className="text-sm">{new Date().toLocaleTimeString()}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

面试考察点：

  • 组件状态管理
  • 用户交互设计
  • 响应式布局
  • 事件冒泡处理
文件资源管理器实现（树形结构）
// 文件资源管理器 - 树形结构实现
import React, { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import { create } from 'zustand';

// 文件/文件夹类型定义
interface FileItem {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  type: 'file' | 'folder';
  path: string;
  children?: FileItem[];
  expanded?: boolean;
  size?: number;
  modifiedTime?: Date;
}

// 文件管理器状态
interface FileManagerState {
  files: FileItem[];
  selectedFile: string | null;
  expandedFolders: Set<string>;

  // 操作方法
  toggleFolder: (id: string) => void;
  selectFile: (id: string) => void;
  createFile: (parentId: string, name: string, type: 'file' | 'folder') => void;
  deleteFile: (id: string) => void;
  renameFile: (id: string, newName: string) => void;
  moveFile: (id: string, newParentId: string) => void;
}

// 初始化文件数据
const initialFiles: FileItem[] = [
  {
    id: 'root',
    name: '我的电脑',
    type: 'folder',
    path: '/',
    expanded: true,
    children: [
      {
        id: 'desktop',
        name: '桌面',
        type: 'folder',
        path: '/desktop',
        children: [
          { id: 'file1', name: '新建文档.txt', type: 'file', path: '/desktop/file1.txt', size: 1024 },
          { id: 'file2', name: '图片.png', type: 'file', path: '/desktop/image.png', size: 2048000 },
        ],
      },
      {
        id: 'documents',
        name: '文档',
        type: 'folder',
        path: '/documents',
        children: [
          { id: 'folder1', name: '项目', type: 'folder', path: '/documents/project' },
          { id: 'file3', name: '笔记.md', type: 'file', path: '/documents/notes.md', size: 4096 },
        ],
      },
      {
        id: 'downloads',
        name: '下载',
        type: 'folder',
        path: '/downloads',
        children: [],
      },
    ],
  },
];

// 创建文件管理器 Store
const useFileManager = create<FileManagerState>((set, get) => ({
  files: initialFiles,
  selectedFile: null,
  expandedFolders: new Set(['root']),

  toggleFolder: (id) => {
    set(state => {
      const newExpanded = new Set(state.expandedFolders);
      if (newExpanded.has(id)) {
        newExpanded.delete(id);
      } else {
        newExpanded.add(id);
      }
      return { expandedFolders: newExpanded };
    });
  },

  selectFile: (id) => {
    set({ selectedFile: id });
  },

  createFile: (parentId, name, type) => {
    const newFile: FileItem = {
      id: `file-${Date.now()}`,
      name,
      type,
      path: `/${parentId}/${name}`,
      children: type === 'folder' ? [] : undefined,
    };

    // 递归查找并添加文件
    const addFile = (files: FileItem[]): FileItem[] => {
      return files.map(file => {
        if (file.id === parentId && file.type === 'folder') {
          return {
            ...file,
            children: [...(file.children || []), newFile],
          };
        }
        if (file.children) {
          return { ...file, children: addFile(file.children) };
        }
        return file;
      });
    };

    set(state => ({ files: addFile(state.files) }));
  },

  deleteFile: (id) => {
    const deleteFileRecursive = (files: FileItem[]): FileItem[] => {
      return files
        .filter(file => file.id !== id)
        .map(file => ({
          ...file,
          children: file.children ? deleteFileRecursive(file.children) : undefined,
        }));
    };

    set(state => ({ files: deleteFileRecursive(state.files) }));
  },

  renameFile: (id, newName) => {
    const rename = (files: FileItem[]): FileItem[] => {
      return files.map(file => {
        if (file.id === id) {
          return { ...file, name: newName };
        }
        if (file.children) {
          return { ...file, children: rename(file.children) };
        }
        return file;
      });
    };

    set(state => ({ files: rename(state.files) }));
  },

  moveFile: (id, newParentId) => {
    // 移动文件逻辑
    console.log('Moving file:', id, 'to', newParentId);
  },
}));

// 文件树组件
export const FileTree: React.FC = () => {
  const { files, selectedFile, expandedFolders, toggleFolder, selectFile } = useFileManager();

  const renderFile = (file: FileItem, depth: number = 0): React.ReactNode => {
    const isFolder = file.type === 'folder';
    const isExpanded = expandedFolders.has(file.id);
    const isSelected = selectedFile === file.id;

    return (
      <div key={file.id}>
        <div
          className={`file-item flex items-center gap-2 py-1 px-2 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-700 ${
            isSelected ? 'bg-blue-600' : ''
          }`}
          style={{ paddingLeft: `${depth * 16 + 8}px` }}
          onClick={() => {
            selectFile(file.id);
            if (isFolder) {
              toggleFolder(file.id);
            }
          }}
        >
          {/* 展开/折叠图标 */}
          {isFolder ? (
            <span className="text-gray-400">
              {isExpanded ? '▼' : '▶'}
            </span>
          ) : (
            <span className="w-4" />
          )}

          {/* 文件/文件夹图标 */}
          <span className="text-lg">
            {isFolder ? (isExpanded ? '📂' : '📁') : getFileIcon(file.name)}
          </span>

          {/* 文件名 */}
          <span className="text-sm truncate">{file.name}</span>

          {/* 文件大小 */}
          {!isFolder && file.size && (
            <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 ml-auto">
              {formatFileSize(file.size)}
            </span>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* 递归渲染子文件 */}
        {isFolder && isExpanded && file.children && (
          <div className="children">
            {file.children.map(child => renderFile(child, depth + 1))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    );
  };

  return (
    <div className="file-tree">
      {files.map(file => renderFile(file))}
    </div>
  );
};

// 工具函数
function getFileIcon(filename: string): string {
  const ext = filename.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase();
  const icons: Record<string, string> = {
    txt: '📄',
    md: '📝',
    js: '📜',
    ts: '📜',
    jsx: '⚛️',
    tsx: '⚛️',
    json: '📋',
    png: '🖼️',
    jpg: '🖼️',
    jpeg: '🖼️',
    gif: '🖼️',
    mp3: '🎵',
    mp4: '🎬',
    zip: '📦',
    rar: '📦',
    pdf: '📕',
    doc: '📘',
    docx: '📘',
    xls: '📗',
    xlsx: '📗',
  };
  return icons[ext || ''] || '📄';
}

function formatFileSize(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes < 1024) return bytes + ' B';
  if (bytes < 1024 * 1024) return (bytes / 1024).toFixed(1) + ' KB';
  return (bytes / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(1) + ' MB';
}

面试考察点：

  • 树形数据结构设计
  • 递归组件渲染
  • Zustand 状态管理
  • 文件操作 CRUD
终端模拟器实现（xterm.js 集成）
// 终端模拟器组件 - xterm.js 集成
import React, { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { Terminal } from 'xterm';
import { FitAddon } from 'xterm-addon-fit';
import { WebLinksAddon } from 'xterm-addon-web-links';
import 'xterm/css/xterm.css';

interface TerminalProps {
  onData?: (data: string) => void;
  onResize?: (cols: number, rows: number) => void;
}

export const VirtualTerminal: React.FC<TerminalProps> = ({ onData, onResize }) => {
  const terminalRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const terminalInstance = useRef<Terminal | null>(null);
  const fitAddon = useRef<FitAddon | null>(null);
  const [isReady, setIsReady] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!terminalRef.current) return;

    // 创建终端实例
    const terminal = new Terminal({
      cursorBlink: true,
      fontSize: 14,
      fontFamily: 'Menlo, Monaco, "Courier New", monospace',
      theme: {
        background: '#1e1e1e',
        foreground: '#d4d4d4',
        cursor: '#ffffff',
        selection: '#264f78',
        black: '#000000',
        red: '#cd3131',
        green: '#0dbc79',
        yellow: '#e5e510',
        blue: '#2472c8',
        magenta: '#bc3fbc',
        cyan: '#11a8cd',
        white: '#e5e5e5',
        brightBlack: '#666666',
        brightRed: '#f14c4c',
        brightGreen: '#23d18b',
        brightYellow: '#f5f543',
        brightBlue: '#3b8eea',
        brightMagenta: '#d670d6',
        brightCyan: '#29b8db',
        brightWhite: '#ffffff',
      },
      allowTransparency: true,
      scrollback: 1000,
    });

    // 创建插件
    const fit = new FitAddon();
    const webLinks = new WebLinksAddon();

    // 加载插件
    terminal.loadAddon(fit);
    terminal.loadAddon(webLinks);

    // 打开终端
    terminal.open(terminalRef.current);
    fit.fit();

    // 设置终端实例
    terminalInstance.current = terminal;
    fitAddon.current = fit;
    setIsReady(true);

    // 监听数据输入
    terminal.onData((data) => {
      onData?.(data);
      // 模拟简单的 shell 响应
      handleTerminalInput(data, terminal);
    });

    // 监听终端尺寸变化
    terminal.onResize(({ cols, rows }) => {
      onResize?.(cols, rows);
    });

    // 初始欢迎信息
    terminal.writeln('\x1b[1;34m WebEnv-OS Terminal \x1b[0m');
    terminal.writeln('Type "help" for available commands.');
    terminal.write('\r\n$ ');

    // 处理终端输入
    const handleTerminalInput = (data: string, term: Terminal) => {
      const code = data.charCodeAt(0);

      if (code === 13) { // Enter
        term.writeln('');
        // 处理命令
        processCommand(term);
      } else if (code === 127) { // Backspace
        if (term._core.buffer.x > 2) {
          term.write('\b \b');
        }
      } else if (code < 32) {
        // 控制字符
      } else {
        term.write(data);
      }
    };

    // 命令处理
    const processCommand = (term: Terminal) => {
      const buffer = term._core.buffer;
      // 简化实现，实际需要更复杂的命令解析
      term.write('$ ');
    };

    // 窗口大小调整时自适应
    const handleResize = () => {
      fit.fit();
    };

    window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize);

    // 清理
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize);
      terminal.dispose();
    };
  }, []);

  // 暴露写方法给父组件
  useEffect(() => {
    if (terminalInstance.current && isReady) {
      // 可以通过 ref 或 context 暴露方法
    }
  }, [isReady]);

  return (
    <div className="terminal-container bg-[#1e1e1e] p-2 rounded">
      <div ref={terminalRef} className="terminal" />
    </div>
  );
};

// 使用示例
export const TerminalApp: React.FC = () => {
  const handleData = (data: string) => {
    console.log('Terminal input:', data);
  };

  const handleResize = (cols: number, rows: number) => {
    console.log('Terminal resized:', cols, rows);
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full w-full">
      <VirtualTerminal onData={handleData} onResize={handleResize} />
    </div>
  );
};

面试考察点：

  • xterm.js 配置与定制
  • 终端模拟器原理
  • 事件处理与数据流
  • 响应式适配
桌面图标网格布局
// 桌面图标网格布局实现
import React, { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import { create } from 'zustand';

interface DesktopIcon {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  icon: string;
  position: { x: number; y: number };
  onClick: () => void;
}

interface DesktopState {
  icons: DesktopIcon[];
  selectedIcon: string | null;
  isDragging: boolean;

  // 操作
  selectIcon: (id: string) => void;
  moveIcon: (id: string, position: { x: number; y: number }) => void;
  setDragging: (isDragging: boolean) => void;
}

const GRID_SIZE = 100; // 网格大小
const ICON_SIZE = 80;  // 图标大小

const useDesktopStore = create<DesktopState>((set) => ({
  icons: [
    { id: '1', name: '回收站', icon: '🗑️', position: { x: 0, y: 0 }, onClick: () => {} },
    { id: '2', name: '我的电脑', icon: '💻', position: { x: 1, y: 0 }, onClick: () => {} },
    { id: '3', name: '浏览器', icon: '🌐', position: { x: 2, y: 0 }, onClick: () => {} },
    { id: '4', name: '文档', icon: '📁', position: { x: 0, y: 1 }, onClick: () => {} },
    { id: '5', name: '设置', icon: '⚙️', position: { x: 1, y: 1 }, onClick: () => {} },
  ],
  selectedIcon: null,
  isDragging: false,

  selectIcon: (id) => set({ selectedIcon: id }),

  moveIcon: (id, position) => {
    // 吸附到网格
    const snappedX = Math.round(position.x / GRID_SIZE) * GRID_SIZE;
    const snappedY = Math.round(position.y / GRID_SIZE) * GRID_SIZE;

    set(state => ({
      icons: state.icons.map(icon =>
        icon.id === id ? { ...icon, position: { x: snappedX, y: snappedY } } : icon
      ),
    }));
  },

  setDragging: (isDragging) => set({ isDragging }),
}));

export const Desktop: React.FC = () => {
  const { icons, selectedIcon, selectIcon, moveIcon, setDragging } = useDesktopStore();
  const [draggingId, setDraggingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const dragStartPos = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 });
  const iconStartPos = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 });

  const handleIconMouseDown = (e: React.MouseEvent, icon: DesktopIcon) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setDraggingId(icon.id);
    setDragging(true);
    selectIcon(icon.id);

    dragStartPos.current = { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY };
    iconStartPos.current = { ...icon.position };

    const handleMouseMove = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      const deltaX = e.clientX - dragStartPos.current.x;
      const deltaY = e.clientY - dragStartPos.current.y;

      moveIcon(icon.id, {
        x: iconStartPos.current.x + deltaX,
        y: iconStartPos.current.y + deltaY,
      });
    };

    const handleMouseUp = () => {
      setDraggingId(null);
      setDragging(false);
      document.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
      document.removeEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
    };

    document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
    document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
  };

  return (
    <div
      className="desktop absolute inset-0 p-4 grid grid-cols-[repeat(auto-fill,80px)] gap-2 content-start"
      onClick={() => selectIcon('')}
    >
      {icons.map(icon => (
        <div
          key={icon.id}
          className={`desktop-icon flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 rounded cursor-pointer transition-colors ${
            selectedIcon === icon.id ? 'bg-blue-500/30' : 'hover:bg-white/10'
          } ${draggingId === icon.id ? 'opacity-50' : ''}`}
          style={{
            position: 'absolute',
            left: icon.position.x,
            top: icon.position.y,
            width: ICON_SIZE,
          }}
          onMouseDown={(e) => handleIconMouseDown(e, icon)}
          onDoubleClick={icon.onClick}
        >
          <span className="text-4xl">{icon.icon}</span>
          <span className="text-xs text-white text-center truncate w-full">
            {icon.name}
          </span>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
};
右键菜单实现
// 右键菜单组件
import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';

interface MenuItem {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  icon?: string;
  shortcut?: string;
  disabled?: boolean;
  divider?: boolean;
  onClick?: () => void;
  children?: MenuItem[];
}

interface ContextMenuProps {
  items: MenuItem[];
  x: number;
  y: number;
  onClose: () => void;
}

export const ContextMenu: React.FC<ContextMenuProps> = ({ items, x, y, onClose }) => {
  const menuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  // 菜单位置调整（防止溢出屏幕）
  useEffect(() => {
    if (menuRef.current) {
      const rect = menuRef.current.getBoundingClientRect();
      const viewportWidth = window.innerWidth;
      const viewportHeight = window.innerHeight;

      let adjustedX = x;
      let adjustedY = y;

      if (x + rect.width > viewportWidth) {
        adjustedX = viewportWidth - rect.width - 10;
      }
      if (y + rect.height > viewportHeight) {
        adjustedY = viewportHeight - rect.height - 10;
      }

      menuRef.current.style.left = `${adjustedX}px`;
      menuRef.current.style.top = `${adjustedY}px`;
    }
  }, [x, y]);

  // 点击外部关闭菜单
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {
        onClose();
      }
    };

    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
  }, [onClose]);

  const renderMenuItem = (item: MenuItem, index: number) => {
    if (item.divider) {
      return <div key={index} className="border-t border-gray-600 my-1" />;
    }

    return (
      <button
        key={item.id}
        className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-left hover:bg-blue-600 ${
          item.disabled ? 'opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed' : ''
        }`}
        onClick={() => {
          if (!item.disabled) {
            item.onClick?.();
            onClose();
          }
        }}
      >
        {item.icon && <span>{item.icon}</span>}
        <span className="flex-1">{item.label}</span>
        {item.shortcut && (
          <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{item.shortcut}</span>
        )}
      </button>
    );
  };

  return (
    <div
      ref={menuRef}
      className="context-menu fixed bg-gray-800 rounded-lg shadow-xl py-1 min-w-[180px] z-[10000]"
      style={{ left: x, top: y }}
    >
      {items.map((item, index) => renderMenuItem(item, index))}
    </div>
  );
};

// 使用示例
export const useContextMenu = () => {
  const [menuState, setMenuState] = useState<{
    visible: boolean;
    x: number;
    y: number;
    items: MenuItem[];
  }>({
    visible: false,
    x: 0,
    y: 0,
    items: [],
  });

  const showMenu = (e: React.MouseEvent, items: MenuItem[]) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setMenuState({
      visible: true,
      x: e.clientX,
      y: e.clientY,
      items,
    });
  };

  const hideMenu = () => {
    setMenuState(prev => ({ ...prev, visible: false }));
  };

  return { menuState, showMenu, hideMenu };
};
壁纸更换功能
// 壁纸管理 Hook
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { persist } from 'zustand/middleware';

interface WallpaperState {
  currentWallpaper: string;
  wallpapers: Wallpaper[];

  // 操作
  setWallpaper: (id: string) => void;
  addWallpaper: (wallpaper: Wallpaper) => void;
  removeWallpaper: (id: string) => void;
}

interface Wallpaper {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  url: string;
  thumbnail?: string;
}

const defaultWallpapers: Wallpaper[] = [
  { id: '1', name: '默认蓝', url: '/wallpapers/blue.jpg' },
  { id: '2', name: '星空', url: '/wallpapers/stars.jpg' },
  { id: '3', name: '山脉', url: '/wallpapers/mountain.jpg' },
  { id: '4', name: '城市', url: '/wallpapers/city.jpg' },
  { id: '5', name: '渐变', url: '/wallpapers/gradient.jpg' },
];

const useWallpaperStore = create<WallpaperState>()(
  persist(
    (set) => ({
      currentWallpaper: '/wallpapers/default.jpg',
      wallpapers: defaultWallpapers,

      setWallpaper: (id) => {
        set((state) => {
          const wallpaper = state.wallpapers.find(w => w.id === id);
          if (wallpaper) {
            return { currentWallpaper: wallpaper.url };
          }
          return state;
        });
      },

      addWallpaper: (wallpaper) => {
        set((state) => ({
          wallpapers: [...state.wallpapers, wallpaper],
        }));
      },

      removeWallpaper: (id) => {
        set((state) => ({
          wallpapers: state.wallpapers.filter(w => w.id !== id),
        }));
      },
    }),
    {
      name: 'wallpaper-storage',
    }
  )
);

// 壁纸组件
export const Desktop: React.FC = () => {
  const { currentWallpaper } = useWallpaperStore();

  return (
    <div
      className="desktop absolute inset-0"
      style={{
        backgroundImage: `url(${currentWallpaper})`,
        backgroundSize: 'cover',
        backgroundPosition: 'center',
      }}
    >
      {/* 桌面内容 */}
    </div>
  );
};

// 壁纸选择面板
export const WallpaperPanel: React.FC<{ onClose: () => void }> = ({ onClose }) => {
  const { wallpapers, currentWallpaper, setWallpaper } = useWallpaperStore();

  return (
    <div className="wallpaper-panel bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4 w-80">
      <h3 className="text-lg font-bold mb-4">选择壁纸</h3>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
        {wallpapers.map(wallpaper => (
          <button
            key={wallpaper.id}
            className={`wallpaper-option rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-2 ${
              currentWallpaper === wallpaper.url ? 'border-blue-500' : 'border-transparent'
            }`}
            onClick={() => {
              setWallpaper(wallpaper.id);
              onClose();
            }}
          >
            <img
              src={wallpaper.thumbnail || wallpaper.url}
              alt={wallpaper.name}
              className="w-full h-24 object-cover"
            />
            <span className="text-xs block p-1">{wallpaper.name}</span>
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
通知系统实现
// 通知系统 Hook + 组件
import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import { create } from 'zustand';

interface Notification {
  id: string;
  type: 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error';
  title: string;
  message: string;
  duration?: number;
  timestamp: Date;
}

interface NotificationState {
  notifications: Notification[];
  addNotification: (notification: Omit<Notification, 'id' | 'timestamp'>) => void;
  removeNotification: (id: string) => void;
  clearAll: () => void;
}

const useNotificationStore = create<NotificationState>((set) => ({
  notifications: [],

  addNotification: (notification) => {
    const id = `notification-${Date.now()}-${Math.random()}`;
    const newNotification: Notification = {
      ...notification,
      id,
      timestamp: new Date(),
    };

    set((state) => ({
      notifications: [...state.notifications, newNotification],
    }));

    // 自动移除
    const duration = notification.duration ?? 5000;
    if (duration > 0) {
      setTimeout(() => {
        set((state) => ({
          notifications: state.notifications.filter(n => n.id !== id),
        }));
      }, duration);
    }
  },

  removeNotification: (id) => {
    set((state) => ({
      notifications: state.notifications.filter(n => n.id !== id),
    }));
  },

  clearAll: () => {
    set({ notifications: [] });
  },
}));

// 通知组件
export const NotificationContainer: React.FC = () => {
  const { notifications, removeNotification } = useNotificationStore();

  const getTypeStyles = (type: Notification['type']) => {
    const styles = {
      info: 'bg-blue-500',
      success: 'bg-green-500',
      warning: 'bg-yellow-500',
      error: 'bg-red-500',
    };
    return styles[type];
  };

  const getTypeIcon = (type: Notification['type']) => {
    const icons = {
      info: 'ℹ️',
      success: '✓',
      warning: '⚠',
      error: '✕',
    };
    return icons[type];
  };

  return (
    <div className="fixed top-4 right-4 z-[10000] flex flex-col gap-2">
      {notifications.map((notification) => (
        <div
          key={notification.id}
          className={`notification flex items-start gap-3 p-4 rounded-lg shadow-lg text-white min-w-[300px] max-w-[400px] animate-slide-in ${getTypeStyles(notification.type)}`}
        >
          <span className="text-xl">{getTypeIcon(notification.type)}</span>
          <div className="flex-1">
            <h4 className="font-bold">{notification.title}</h4>
            <p className="text-sm opacity-90">{notification.message}</p>
          </div>
          <button
            className="text-white/80 hover:text-white"
            onClick={() => removeNotification(notification.id)}
          >
            ✕
          </button>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
};

// 使用 Hook
export const useNotification = () => {
  const { addNotification } = useNotificationStore();

  return {
    info: (title: string, message: string) =>
      addNotification({ type: 'info', title, message }),
    success: (title: string, message: string) =>
      addNotification({ type: 'success', title, message }),
    warning: (title: string, message: string) =>
      addNotification({ type: 'warning', title, message }),
    error: (title: string, message: string) =>
      addNotification({ type: 'error', title, message }),
  };
};
窗口动画效果（Framer Motion）
// 窗口动画组件
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';

// 窗口打开动画
export const windowVariants = {
  hidden: {
    opacity: 0,
    scale: 0.8,
    y: 20,
  },
  visible: {
    opacity: 1,
    scale: 1,
    y: 0,
    transition: {
      type: 'spring',
      stiffness: 300,
      damping: 25,
    },
  },
  exit: {
    opacity: 0,
    scale: 0.8,
    y: 20,
    transition: {
      duration: 0.2,
    },
  },
};

// 最大化动画
export const maximizeVariants = {
  normal: {
    width: 500,
    height: 400,
    borderRadius: 8,
  },
  maximized: {
    width: '100vw',
    height: 'calc(100vh - 48px)', // 减去任务栏高度
    borderRadius: 0,
    transition: {
      type: 'spring',
      stiffness: 200,
      damping: 30,
    },
  },
};

// 使用示例
export const AnimatedWindow: React.FC<{
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  isMaximized: boolean;
  onMaximize: () => void;
  children: React.ReactNode;
}> = ({ isOpen, onClose, isMaximized, onMaximize, children }) => {
  return (
    <AnimatePresence>
      {isOpen && (
        <motion.div
          className="window bg-gray-800 rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-2xl"
          variants={windowVariants}
          initial="hidden"
          animate="visible"
          exit="exit"
          style={isMaximized ? {
            position: 'fixed',
            top: 0,
            left: 0,
            width: '100vw',
            height: 'calc(100vh - 48px)',
            borderRadius: 0,
          } : undefined}
        >
          {/* 标题栏 */}
          <motion.div className="titlebar flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 bg-gray-700">
            <span>窗口标题</span>
            <div className="flex gap-2">
              <button onClick={onMaximize}>□</button>
              <button onClick={onClose}>✕</button>
            </div>
          </motion.div>

          {/* 内容 */}
          <div className="content p-4">
            {children}
          </div>
        </motion.div>
      )}
    </AnimatePresence>
  );
};

面试考察点：

  • Framer Motion 动画配置
  • AnimatePresence 条件渲染动画
  • Spring 物理动画
  • CSS 动画性能优化

5.5 学习途径与水平展示

5.5.1 技术学习路径

前端学习路线：
┣━━ 入门阶段 (1-3个月)
┃   ┣━━ HTML/CSS 基础
┃   ┃   ┣━━ 语义化标签
┃   ┃   ┣━━ CSS 盒模型
┃   ┃   ┣━━ Flex 布局
┃   ┃   ┗━━ Grid 布局
┃   ┣━━ JavaScript 基础
┃   ┃   ┣━━ 数据类型和变量
┃   ┃   ┣━━ 函数和作用域
┃   ┃   ┣━━ 异步编程 (Promise, async/await)
┃   ┃   ┗━━ DOM 操作
┃   ┗━━ 实战：静态页面
┃       ┣━━ 个人简历页面
┃       ┣━━ 电商首页
┃       ┗━━ 响应式博客
┣━━ 框架阶段 (3-6个月)
┃   ┣━━ React/Vue 学习
┃   ┃   ┣━━ 组件化开发
┃   ┃   ┣━━ 状态管理
┃   ┃   ┣━━ 路由管理
┃   ┃   ┗━━ 生命周期/Hooks
┃   ┣━━ TypeScript 入门
┃   ┃   ┣━━ 类型系统
┃   ┃   ┣━━ 接口和泛型
┃   ┃   ┗━━ 实用工具类型
┃   ┗━━ 实战：Todo 列表、博客系统
┣━━ 工程化阶段 (6-9个月)
┃   ┣━━ Webpack/Vite
┃   ┃   ┣━━ 打包原理
┃   ┃   ┣━━ Loader 和 Plugin
┃   ┃   ┗━━ 开发优化
┃   ┣━━ Git 工作流
┃   ┃   ┣━━ 分支管理
┃   ┃   ┣━━ 代码审查
┃   ┃   ┗━━ CI/CD 基础
┃   ┗━━ 单元测试
┃       ┣━━ Jest/Vitest
┃   ┃   ┣━━ 组件测试
┃   ┃   ┗━━ 覆盖率
┣━━ 进阶阶段 (9-12个月)
┃   ┣━━ 性能优化
┃   ┃   ┣━━ Core Web Vitals
┃   ┃   ┣━━ 首屏加载优化
┃   ┃   ┗━━ 运行时优化
┃   ┣━━ 架构设计
┃   ┃   ┣━━ 组件设计模式
┃   ┃   ┣━━ 状态管理架构
┃   ┃   ┗━━ 微前端入门
┃   ┗━━ 服务端渲染
┃       ┣━━ Next.js/Nuxt
┃       ┣━━ SSR vs SSG
┃       ┗━━ 数据获取策略
┗━━ 专家阶段 (1年以上)
    ┣━━ 微前端
    ┃   ┣━━ qiankun
    ┃   ┣━━ Module Federation
    ┃   ┗━━ 沙箱隔离
    ┣━━ 低代码平台
    ┃   ┣━━ 可视化搭建
    ┃   ┣━━ Schema 设计
    ┃   ┗━━ 物料市场
    ┗━━ AI/大模型应用
        ┣━━ LLM API 集成
        ┣━━ Prompt 工程
        ┗━━ AI 辅助开发

5.5.2 技术水平评估标准

初级前端 (1-2年):
┣━━ 技能要求
┃   ┣━━ 熟练使用 React 或 Vue
┃   ┣━━ 能够完成需求开发
┃   ┣━━ 了解基本优化手段
┃   ┗━━ 掌握 Git 基本操作
┣━━ 产出标准
┃   ┣━━ 按时完成功能开发
┃   ┣━━ 代码质量基本合格
┃   ┗━━ 能配合联调和测试
┗━━ 成长方向
    ┣━━ 深入框架原理
    ┗━━ 建立工程化意识

中级前端 (2-4年):
┣━━ 技能要求
┃   ┣━━ 独立负责模块开发
┃   ┣━━ 性能优化经验
┃   ┣━━ 参与技术选型
┃   ┗━━ 掌握 TypeScript
┣━━ 产出标准
┃   ┣━━ 模块设计合理
┃   ┣━━ 代码可维护性好
┃   ┗━━ 性能指标达标
┗━━ 成长方向
    ┣━━ 架构设计能力
    ┗━━ 团队协作经验

高级前端 (4-6年):
┣━━ 技能要求
┃   ┣━━ 主导项目架构设计
┃   ┣━━ 团队技术输出
┃   ┣━━ 开源项目贡献
┃   ┗━━ 前沿技术跟进
┣━━ 产出标准
┃   ┣━━ 技术方案被验证有效
┃   ┣━━ 团队技术能力提升
┃   ┗━━ 业务价值体现
┗━━ 成长方向
    ┣━━ 技术管理/专家路径
    ┗━━ 行业影响力

资深前端/技术专家 (6年+):
┣━━ 技能要求
┃   ┣━━ 技术战略规划
┃   ┣━━ 团队建设
┃   ┣━━ 行业影响力
┃   ┗━━ 商业理解能力
┣━━ 产出标准
┃   ┣━━ 技术方向正确
┃   ┣━━ 团队成熟稳定
┃   ┗━━ 业务持续增长
┗━━ 成长方向
    ┣━━ CTO/技术VP
    ┗━━ 创业者/投资人

5.5.3 学习资源推荐

书籍：

┃   ┣━━ 《大型网站技术架构》
┃   ┗━━ 《架构整洁之道》

5.5.4 前端技术全景图

┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
   
┃                            前端知识体系                                        ┃
┃  基础层                                                                     ┃
   
┃  ┣━━ HTML5 (语义化标签, 表单, API)                                          ┃
   
┃  ┃   ┣━━ 语义化标签 (header, nav, article, section, footer)              ┃
      
┃  ┃   ┣━━ 表单增强 (input types, validation, formdata)                     ┃
     
┃  ┃   ┗━━ API (Canvas, WebGL, WebRTC, Geolocation)                        ┃
      
┃  ┣━━ CSS3 (布局, 动画, 响应式)                                             ┃
    
┃  ┃   ┣━━ 布局 (Flexbox, Grid, Box Model)                                  ┃
     
┃  ┃   ┣━━ 动画 (transition, animation, transform)                          ┃
     
┃  ┃   ┣━━ 响应式 (media queries, container queries)                        ┃
     
┃  ┃   ┗━━ CSS 预处理器 (Sass, Less, PostCSS)                               ┃
     
┃  ┣━━ JavaScript (ES6+, TS, 设计模式)                                       ┃
    
┃  ┃   ┣━━ ES6+ (解构, 箭头函数, Promise, async/await, 模块化)              ┃
     
┃  ┃   ┣━━ TypeScript (类型系统, 泛型, 工具类型)                             ┃
    
┃  ┃   ┗━━ 设计模式 (单例, 工厂, 观察者, 发布订阅)                           ┃
    
┃  ┗━━ 计算机网络 (HTTP, WebSocket, 安全)                                     ┃
   
┃      ┣━━ HTTP/HTTPS (1.1, 2, 3, 缓存, CORS)                                ┃
    
┃      ┣━━ WebSocket (Socket.io, 实时通信)                                   ┃
    
┃      ┗━━ 安全 (XSS, CSRF, CSP, HTTPS)                                      ┃
    
┃  框架层                                                                     ┃
   
┃  ┣━━ React (核心概念, Hooks, 状态管理)                                      ┃
   
┃  ┃   ┣━━ React 18/19 新特性 (Concurrent, Server Components)              ┃
      
┃  ┃   ┣━━ Next.js (SSR/SSG/ISR)                                           ┃
      
┃  ┃   ┣━━ 状态管理 (Zustand, Redux Toolkit, Jotai, Recoil)               ┃
       
┃  ┃   ┣━━ 数据获取 (React Query, SWR, TanStack Query)                      ┃
     
┃  ┃   ┗━━ 路由 (React Router, Next.js App Router)                          ┃
     
┃  ┣━━ Vue (响应式, Composition API, Pinia)                                  ┃
    
┃  ┃   ┣━━ Vue 3 核心原理 (Proxy, Ref, Computed, Watch)                    ┃
      
┃  ┃   ┣━━ Nuxt.js (SSR/SSG)                                               ┃
      
┃  ┃   ┗━━ Pinia / Vuex                                                     ┃
     
┃  ┗━━ Svelte (编译时优化)                                                   ┃
    
┃      ┣━━ Svelte 4/5 特性                                                  ┃
     
┃      ┗━━ SvelteKit                                                        ┃
     
┃  工程化层                                                                   ┃
   
┃  ┣━━ 构建工具                                                              ┃
    
┃  ┃   ┣━━ Webpack 5 (成熟生态, Module Federation)                         ┃
      
┃  ┃   ┣━━ Vite (开发体验, esbuild)                                         ┃

5.5.5 框架对比与选型

React vs Vue vs Angular 对比
对比维度 React Vue Angular
学习曲线 中等 较平缓 陡峭
社区生态 非常活跃 活跃 活跃
状态管理 Redux/Zustand/Jotai Pinia/Vuex NgRx/Signal
渲染方式 Virtual DOM Virtual DOM 脏检查
数据绑定 单向为主 双向(可选) 双向
TypeScript 推荐支持 原生支持 原生支持
打包体积 较小 最小 较大
灵活性 高 中 低
适用场景 复杂交互/大型应用 中小型项目 企业级应用
企业使用 Meta, Airbnb, Netflix 阿里巴巴, 字节 Google, 微软
状态管理选型指南
场景 推荐方案 说明
简单状态 React Context / Vue provide 无需额外依赖
中等复杂度 Zustand / Pinia 轻量级 API
复杂企业级 Redux Toolkit / NgRx 严格架构
服务端数据 React Query / SWR / TanStack Query 数据同步/缓存
持久化状态 zustand/persist 本地存储
协作应用 Yjs + 状态绑定 CRDT
原子化状态 Jotai / Recoil 原子化管理
全局配置 React Context + useReducer 主题/语言
构建工具选型
场景 推荐工具 理由
大型项目 Webpack 5 成熟生态，插件丰富
中小型项目 Vite 开发体验好，HMR 快
Next.js 项目 Turbopack 官方集成，构建快
库/组件 Rollup Tree Shaking 好
极致速度 esbuild Go 实现，极速
现代框架 Parcel 零配置
组件库选型
类型 推荐 特点
React 企业级 Ant Design 功能全面，文档好
React 轻量级 Chakra UI / Headless UI 可定制，灵活
Vue 企业级 Element Plus 饿了么出品
Vue 轻量级 Naive UI 组件丰富，TypeScript
移动端 Vant (有赞) 移动端优先
无样式 Radix UI / Headless UI 可访问性
编辑器技术选型
场景 推荐方案 关键特性
富文本编辑 TipTap ProseMirror, Yjs 支持
代码编辑 Monaco Editor VS Code 同款
Markdown Milkdown / ByteMD 所见即所得
表格编辑 Handsontable Excel 体验
块编辑器 Editor.js 块式结构
实时协作技术选型
需求 推荐方案 备注
文本协作 Yjs CRDT, 性能好
结构化数据 Automerge JSON-like
实时同步 Socket.io / WebSocket 基础实时
视频会议 LiveKit / Agora WebRTC
状态同步 CRDT 离线优先

七、常见场景题

6.1 无限滚动实现

// 无限滚动组件
function InfiniteScroll({
  loadMore,
  hasMore,
  loader = <div>Loading...</div>,
  threshold = 200
}) {
  const observerRef = useRef(null);
  const loadingRef = useRef(false);

  const lastElementRef = useCallback(node => {
    if (loadingRef.current) return;

    if (observerRef.current) observerRef.current.disconnect();

    observerRef.current = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      if (entries[0].isIntersecting && hasMore && !loadingRef.current) {
        loadingRef.current = true;
        Promise.resolve(loadMore()).finally(() => {
          loadingRef.current = false;
        });
      }
    }, { rootMargin: `${threshold}px` });

    if (node) observerRef.current.observe(node);
