  }, [loadMore, hasMore, threshold]);

  return (
    <div>
      {children}
      {hasMore && <div ref={lastElementRef}>{loader}</div>}
    </div>
  );
}

// 使用示例
function UserList() {
  const [users, setUsers] = useState([]);
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [hasMore, setHasMore] = useState(true);

  const loadMore = async () => {
    const newUsers = await fetchUsers(page);
    if (newUsers.length === 0) {
      setHasMore(false);
    } else {
      setUsers(prev => [...prev, ...newUsers]);
      setPage(prev => prev + 1);
    }
  };

  return (
    <InfiniteScroll loadMore={loadMore} hasMore={hasMore}>
      {users.map(user => (
        <UserCard key={user.id} user={user} />
      ))}
    </InfiniteScroll>
  );
}

6.2 大文件上传

// 分片上传实现
class ChunkUploader {
  constructor(file, options = {}) {
    this.file = file;
    this.chunkSize = options.chunkSize || 2 * 1024 * 1024; // 2MB
    this.concurrent = options.concurrent || 3;
    this.onProgress = options.onProgress || (() => {});
  }

  async upload() {
    const chunks = this.createChunks();
    const uploaded = [];

    // 上传每个分片
    for (let i = 0; i < chunks.length; i += this.concurrent) {
      const batch = chunks.slice(i, i + this.concurrent);
      const results = await Promise.all(
        batch.map(chunk => this.uploadChunk(chunk))
      );
      uploaded.push(...results);

      const progress = (uploaded.length / chunks.length) * 100;
      this.onProgress(progress);
    }

    // 合并分片
    await this.mergeChunks(uploaded);

    return uploaded;
  }

  createChunks() {
    const chunks = [];
    let start = 0;

    while (start < this.file.size) {
      const end = Math.min(start + this.chunkSize, this.file.size);
      chunks.push({
        start,
        end,
        blob: this.file.slice(start, end),
        hash: this.calculateHash(start, end)
      });
      start = end;
    }

    return chunks;
  }

  async uploadChunk(chunk) {
    const formData = new FormData();
    formData.append('chunk', chunk.blob);
    formData.append('hash', chunk.hash);
    formData.append('index', chunk.start / this.chunkSize);

    await fetch('/api/upload/chunk', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: formData
    });

    return chunk.hash;
  }

  calculateHash(start, end) {
    // 简化版：使用 slice 位置作为 hash
    return `${start}-${end}`;
  }

  async mergeChunks(hashes) {
    await fetch('/api/upload/merge', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        fileName: this.file.name,
        hashes
      })
    });
  }
}

// 使用示例
function FileUploader() {
  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(0);

  const handleFileChange = async (e) => {
    const file = e.target.files[0];
    if (!file) return;

    const uploader = new ChunkUploader(file, {
      chunkSize: 1024 * 1024, // 1MB
      concurrent: 2,
      onProgress: setProgress
    });

    await uploader.upload();
    console.log('Upload complete');
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <input type="file" onChange={handleFileChange} />
      <progress value={progress} max="100" />
    </div>
  );
}

6.3 实时聊天系统

// 实时聊天系统
function useChat(roomId) {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]);
  const [connectionStatus, setConnectionStatus] = useState('disconnected');
  const wsRef = useRef(null);
  const reconnectTimerRef = useRef(null);

  // 连接 WebSocket
  const connect = useCallback(() => {
    wsRef.current = new WebSocket(`wss://chat.example.com/room/${roomId}`);

    wsRef.current.onopen = () => {
      setConnectionStatus('connected');
      clearTimeout(reconnectTimerRef.current);
    };

    wsRef.current.onmessage = (event) => {
      const message = JSON.parse(event.data);
      setMessages(prev => [...prev, message]);
    };

    wsRef.current.onclose = () => {
      setConnectionStatus('disconnected');
      // 自动重连
      reconnectTimerRef.current = setTimeout(connect, 3000);
    };

    wsRef.current.onerror = (error) => {
      console.error('WebSocket error:', error);
    };
  }, [roomId]);

  // 发送消息
  const sendMessage = useCallback((content) => {
    if (wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
      wsRef.current.send(JSON.stringify({
        type: 'message',
        content,
        timestamp: Date.now()
      }));
    }
  }, []);

  // 断开连接
  const disconnect = useCallback(() => {
    clearTimeout(reconnectTimerRef.current);
    wsRef.current?.close();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    connect();
    return () => disconnect();
  }, [connect, disconnect]);

  return { messages, sendMessage, connectionStatus };
}

// 聊天组件
function ChatRoom({ roomId }) {
  const { messages, sendMessage, connectionStatus } = useChat(roomId);
  const [input, setInput] = useState('');
  const messagesEndRef = useRef(null);

  const handleSend = () => {
    if (input.trim()) {
      sendMessage(input);
      setInput('');
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
  }, [messages]);

  return (
    <div className="chat-room">
      <div className="status">
        Status: {connectionStatus}
      </div>
      <div className="messages">
        {messages.map((msg, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="message">
            {msg.content}
          </div>
        ))}
        <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
      </div>
      <div className="input-area">
        <input
          value={input}
          onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)}
          onKeyPress={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSend()}
        />
        <button onClick={handleSend}>Send</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

6.4 搜索建议功能

// 防抖搜索 Hook
function useSearchSuggestions(searchFn, debounceMs = 300) {
  const [query, setQuery] = useState('');
  const [suggestions, setSuggestions] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const debouncedSearch = useMemo(
    () => debounce(async (searchQuery) => {
      if (!searchQuery.trim()) {
        setSuggestions([]);
        return;
      }

      setLoading(true);
      try {
        const results = await searchFn(searchQuery);
        setSuggestions(results);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Search error:', error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    }, debounceMs),
    [searchFn, debounceMs]
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    debouncedSearch(query);
  }, [query, debouncedSearch]);

  const clearSuggestions = useCallback(() => {
    setSuggestions([]);
    setQuery('');
  }, []);

  return { query, setQuery, suggestions, loading, clearSuggestions };
}

// 搜索建议组件
function SearchInput() {
  const { query, setQuery, suggestions, loading } = useSearchSuggestions(
    async (searchQuery) => {
      // 模拟 API 调用
      const response = await fetch(`/api/search?q=${searchQuery}`);
      return response.json();
    }
  );

  return (
    <div className="search-container">
      <input
        value={query}
        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}
        placeholder="Search..."
      />
      {loading && <span className="loading">Loading...</span>}
      {suggestions.length > 0 && (
        <ul className="suggestions">
          {suggestions.map((item) => (
            <li
              key={item.id}
              onClick={() => {
                setQuery(item.text);
                setSuggestions([]);
              }}
            >
              {highlightMatch(item.text, query)}
            </li>
          ))}
        </ul>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// 高亮匹配文本
function highlightMatch(text, query) {
  if (!query) return text;

  const regex = new RegExp(`(${query})`, 'gi');
  const parts = text.split(regex);

  return parts.map((part, i) =>
    regex.test(part) ? <mark key={i}>{part}</mark> : part
  );
}

6.5 级联选择器（省市区选择）

// 省市区数据（实际项目中通常从接口获取）
const regionData = [
  {
    value: '110000',
    label: '北京市',
    children: [
      {
        value: '110100',
        label: '市辖区',
        children: [
          { value: '110101', label: '东城区' },
          { value: '110102', label: '西城区' },
          { value: '110105', label: '朝阳区' },
          { value: '110106', label: '丰台区' },
          { value: '110107', label: '石景山区' },
          { value: '110108', label: '海淀区' }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    value: '310000',
    label: '上海市',
    children: [
      {
        value: '310100',
        label: '市辖区',
        children: [
          { value: '310101', label: '黄浦区' },
          { value: '310104', label: '徐汇区' },
          { value: '310105', label: '长宁区' },
          { value: '310106', label: '静安区' },
          { value: '310107', label: '普陀区' },
          { value: '310109', label: '虹口区' }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
];

// 级联选择器组件
function CascaderSelect({ value, onChange, options = regionData }) {
  const [selectedOptions, setSelectedOptions] = useState([]);

  // 加载子级数据（实际项目中可能需要异步加载）
  const loadData = useCallback((selectedOptions) => {
    const targetValue = selectedOptions[selectedOptions.length - 1].value;
    // 模拟异步加载
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      setTimeout(() => {
        // 实际项目中这里从接口获取数据
        resolve();
      }, 300);
    });
  }, []);

  const handleChange = (value, selectedOptions) => {
    setSelectedOptions(selectedOptions);
    onChange?.(value);
  };

  return (
    <Cascader
      options={options}
      value={value}
      onChange={handleChange}
      loadData={loadData}
      placeholder="请选择省市区"
      changeOnSelect
    />
  );
}

// 使用示例
function AddressForm() {
  const [address, setAddress] = useState([]);

  const handleSubmit = () => {
    const [province, city, district] = address;
    console.log('选择的地址:', {
      province: province,
      city: city,
      district: district
    });
  };

  return (
    <form>
      <CascaderSelect
        value={address}
        onChange={setAddress}
      />
      <button type="button" onClick={handleSubmit}>提交</button>
    </form>
  );
}

// 手写级联选择器（简化版）
function SimpleCascader({ options, value, onChange }) {
  const [currentLevel, setCurrentLevel] = useState(0);
  const [path, setPath] = useState([]);

  const currentOptions = path.length === 0
    ? options
    : path[path.length - 1].children || [];

  const handleSelect = (option) => {
    const newPath = [...path, option];
    setPath(newPath);
    setCurrentLevel(newPath.length);

    const values = newPath.map(p => p.value);
    onChange?.(values);

    // 如果有子级，继续展开；否则关闭
    if (option.children && option.children.length > 0) {
      // 等待用户选择
    } else {
      // 已选中最后一级
    }
  };

  const handleBack = (index) => {
    const newPath = path.slice(0, index + 1);
    setPath(newPath);
    setCurrentLevel(newPath.length);
  };

  return (
    <div className="cascader">
      {/* 已选路径 */}
      {path.length > 0 && (
        <div className="cascader-path">
          {path.map((item, index) => (
            <span key={index}>
              <span onClick={() => handleBack(index)}>{item.label}</span>
              {index < path.length - 1 && ' / '}
            </span>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* 选项列表 */}
      <div className="cascader-panel">
        {currentOptions.map(option => (
          <div
            key={option.value}
            className="cascader-option"
            onClick={() => handleSelect(option)}
          >
            {option.label}
            {option.children && option.children.length > 0 && ' >'}
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

面试考察点：

  • 级联选择器数据结构的設計
  • 异步加载子级数据的处理
  • 回显和清空功能的实现
  • 性能优化（大数据量虚拟滚动）

常见追问：

  • 如何处理数据量很大的情况？
  • 如何实现搜索过滤功能？
  • 如何保证选择的完整性？

6.6 日期范围选择器

// 日期范围选择器
function DateRangePicker({ value, onChange, format = 'YYYY-MM-DD' }) {
  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(value?.[0] || null);
  const [endDate, setEndDate] = useState(value?.[1] || null);
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
  const [currentMonth, setCurrentMonth] = useState(new Date());

  // 生成日历数据
  const generateCalendarDays = (date) => {
    const year = date.getFullYear();
    const month = date.getMonth();
    const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1);
    const lastDay = new Date(year, month + 1, 0);
    const startPadding = firstDay.getDay();
    const days = [];

    // 填充上个月的天数
    for (let i = startPadding - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      const d = new Date(year, month, -i);
      days.push({ date: d, isCurrentMonth: false });
    }

    // 当月天数
    for (let i = 1; i <= lastDay.getDate(); i++) {
      days.push({ date: new Date(year, month, i), isCurrentMonth: true });
    }

    // 填充下个月的天数
    const remaining = 42 - days.length;
    for (let i = 1; i <= remaining; i++) {
      days.push({ date: new Date(year, month + 1, i), isCurrentMonth: false });
    }

    return days;
  };

  const calendarDays = generateCalendarDays(currentMonth);

  const isInRange = (date) => {
    if (!startDate || !endDate) return false;
    return date >= startDate && date <= endDate;
  };

  const isStartOrEnd = (date) => {
    if (!startDate || !endDate) return false;
    const dateStr = date.toDateString();
    return dateStr === startDate.toDateString() ||
           dateStr === endDate.toDateString();
  };

  const handleDateClick = (date) => {
    if (!startDate || (startDate && endDate)) {
      // 重新开始选择
      setStartDate(date);
      setEndDate(null);
    } else if (date < startDate) {
      // 开始日期大于结束日期，重新选择
      setStartDate(date);
    } else {
      // 选择结束日期
      setEndDate(date);
      onChange?.([startDate, date]);
      setIsOpen(false);
    }
  };

  const formatDate = (date, fmt) => {
    if (!date) return '';
    const d = new Date(date);
    const o = {
      'YYYY': d.getFullYear(),
      'MM': String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0'),
      'DD': String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')
    };
    return fmt.replace(/YYYY|MM|DD/g, matched => o[matched]);
  };

  const goToPrevMonth = () => {
    setCurrentMonth(new Date(currentMonth.getFullYear(), currentMonth.getMonth() - 1));
  };

  const goToNextMonth = () => {
    setCurrentMonth(new Date(currentMonth.getFullYear(), currentMonth.getMonth() + 1));
  };

  return (
    <div className="date-range-picker">
      <input
        readOnly
        value={`${formatDate(startDate, format)} - ${formatDate(endDate, format)}`}
        onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
        placeholder="选择日期范围"
      />

      {isOpen && (
        <div className="date-picker-dropdown">
          <div className="calendar-header">
            <button onClick={goToPrevMonth}>&lt;</button>
            <span>
              {currentMonth.getFullYear()}年{currentMonth.getMonth() + 1}月
            </span>
            <button onClick={goToNextMonth}>&gt;</button>
          </div>

          <div className="calendar-weekdays">
            {['日', '一', '二', '三', '四', '五', '六'].map(day => (
              <div key={day}>{day}</div>
            ))}
          </div>

          <div className="calendar-days">
            {calendarDays.map(({ date, isCurrentMonth }, index) => {
              const inRange = isInRange(date);
              const isStartOrEndDate = isStartOrEnd(date);
              const isToday = date.toDateString() === new Date().toDateString();

              return (
                <div
                  key={index}
                  className={`calendar-day ${!isCurrentMonth ? 'other-month' : ''} ${
                    inRange ? 'in-range' : ''
                  } ${isStartOrEndDate ? 'selected' : ''} ${isToday ? 'today' : ''}`}
                  onClick={() => handleDateClick(date)}
                >
                  {date.getDate()}
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// 使用快捷选项
function DateRangePickerWithShortcuts({ value, onChange }) {
  const [selectedRange, setSelectedRange] = useState(value);

  const shortcuts = [
    { label: '今天', value: [new Date(), new Date()] },
    { label: '昨天', value: [new Date(Date.now() - 86400000), new Date(Date.now() - 86400000)] },
    { label: '最近7天', value: [new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 86400000), new Date()] },
    { label: '最近30天', value: [new Date(Date.now() - 30 * 86400000), new Date()] },
    { label: '本月', value: [new Date(new Date().getFullYear(), new Date().getMonth(), 1), new Date()] },
    { label: '本年', value: [new Date(new Date().getFullYear(), 0, 1), new Date()] }
  ];

  const handleShortcutClick = (shortcut) => {
    setSelectedRange(shortcut.value);
    onChange?.(shortcut.value);
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="shortcuts">
        {shortcuts.map(shortcut => (
          <button key={shortcut.label} onClick={() => handleShortcutClick(shortcut)}>
            {shortcut.label}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>
      <DateRangePicker value={selectedRange} onChange={setSelectedRange} />
    </div>
  );
}

面试考察点：

  • 日历组件的实现原理
  • 日期范围的选择逻辑
  • 边界情况处理（跨月、跨年）
  • 时区处理

常见追问：

  • 如何处理时分秒的选择？
  • 如何实现禁用特定日期？
  • 如何与后端日期格式对接？

6.7 图片上传（单图/多图/拖拽上传）

// 单图上传组件
function SingleImageUploader({ value, onChange, maxSize = 5 * 1024 * 1024 }) {
  const [preview, setPreview] = useState(value);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState(null);
  const inputRef = useRef(null);

  const handleFileChange = async (e) => {
    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
    if (!file) return;

    // 验证文件大小
    if (file.size > maxSize) {
      setError(`文件大小不能超过 ${maxSize / 1024 / 1024}MB`);
      return;
    }

    // 验证文件类型
    if (!file.type.startsWith('image/')) {
      setError('请选择图片文件');
      return;
    }

    setError(null);
    setLoading(true);

    try {
      // 生成预览
      const previewUrl = await generatePreview(file);
      setPreview(previewUrl);

      // 上传到服务器
      const url = await uploadFile(file);
      onChange?.(url);
    } catch (err) {
      setError('上传失败');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const generatePreview = (file) => {
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      const reader = new FileReader();
      reader.onload = (e) => resolve(e.target.result);
      reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    });
  };

  const uploadFile = async (file) => {
    const formData = new FormData();
    formData.append('file', file);

    const response = await fetch('/api/upload', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: formData
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    return data.url;
  };

  const handleRemove = () => {
    setPreview(null);
    onChange?.(null);
    if (inputRef.current) {
      inputRef.current.value = '';
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="single-uploader">
      {preview ? (
        <div className="preview">
          <img src={preview} alt="预览" />
          <div className="actions">
            <button onClick={() => inputRef.current?.click()}>替换</button>
            <button onClick={handleRemove}>删除</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div
          className="upload-placeholder"
          onClick={() => inputRef.current?.click()}
        >
          {loading ? '上传中...' : '+ 添加图片'}
        </div>
      )}
      <input
        ref={inputRef}
        type="file"
        accept="image/*"
        onChange={handleFileChange}
        style={{ display: 'none' }}
      />
      {error && <div className="error">{error}</div>}
    </div>
  );
}

// 多图上传组件
function MultipleImageUploader({ value = [], onChange, maxCount = 9 }) {
  const [fileList, setFileList] = useState([]);

  // 初始化已有图片
  useEffect(() => {
    setFileList(value.map((url, index) => ({
      uid: `exist-${index}`,
      url,
      status: 'done'
    })));
  }, [value]);

  const handleFileChange = async (e) => {
    const files = Array.from(e.target.files);

    if (fileList.length + files.length > maxCount) {
      alert(`最多上传 ${maxCount} 张图片`);
      return;
    }

    const newFileList = [];

    for (const file of files) {
      const preview = await generatePreview(file);
      newFileList.push({
        uid: `new-${Date.now()}-${Math.random()}`,
        file,
        url: preview,
        status: 'uploading'
      });
    }

    setFileList(prev => [...prev, ...newFileList]);

    // 依次上传
    for (const item of newFileList) {
      try {
        const uploadedUrl = await uploadFile(item.file);
        setFileList(prev => prev.map(f =>
          f.uid === item.uid
            ? { ...f, url: uploadedUrl, status: 'done' }
            : f
        ));
      } catch (err) {
        setFileList(prev => prev.map(f =>
          f.uid === item.uid
            ? { ...f, status: 'error', error: '上传失败' }
            : f
        ));
      }
    }
  };

  const generatePreview = (file) => {
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      const reader = new FileReader();
      reader.onload = (e) => resolve(e.target.result);
      reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    });
  };

  const uploadFile = async (file) => {
    const formData = new FormData();
    formData.append('files', file);

    const response = await fetch('/api/upload/multiple', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: formData
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    return data.url;
  };

  const handleRemove = (uid) => {
    const newFileList = fileList.filter(f => f.uid !== uid);
    setFileList(newFileList);
    onChange?.(newFileList.filter(f => f.status === 'done').map(f => f.url));
  };

  const handleReorder = (dragIndex, dropIndex) => {
    const newList = [...fileList];
    const [draggedItem] = newList.splice(dragIndex, 1);
    newList.splice(dropIndex, 0, draggedItem);
    setFileList(newList);
    onChange?.(newList.filter(f => f.status === 'done').map(f => f.url));
  };

  return (
    <div className="multiple-uploader">
      <div className="file-list">
        {fileList.map((item, index) => (
          <div key={item.uid} className="file-item">
            <img src={item.url} alt="" />
            {item.status === 'uploading' && <div className="uploading">上传中...</div>}
            {item.status === 'error' && <div className="error">{item.error}</div>}
            {item.status === 'done' && (
              <>
                <button className="remove" onClick={() => handleRemove(item.uid)}>x</button>
                <div className="drag-handle">::</div>
              </>
            )}
          </div>
        ))}
        {fileList.length < maxCount && (
          <div className="upload-placeholder" onClick={() => document.getElementById('multi-file-input').click()}>
            + 添加
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      <input
        id="multi-file-input"
        type="file"
        accept="image/*"
        multiple
        onChange={handleFileChange}
        style={{ display: 'none' }}
      />
    </div>
  );
}

// 拖拽上传组件
function DragDropUploader({ onChange }) {
  const [isDragging, setIsDragging] = useState(false);
  const [uploadProgress, setUploadProgress] = useState({});

  const handleDragEnter = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    setIsDragging(true);
  };

  const handleDragLeave = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    setIsDragging(false);
  };

  const handleDragOver = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
  };

  const handleDrop = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    setIsDragging(false);

    const files = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files);
    await handleUpload(files);
  };

  const handleFileInput = async (e) => {
    const files = Array.from(e.target.files);
    await handleUpload(files);
  };

  const handleUpload = async (files) => {
    for (const file of files) {
      if (!file.type.startsWith('image/')) {
        alert('请上传图片文件');
        continue;
      }

      const fileId = `file-${Date.now()}-${Math.random()}`;
      setUploadProgress(prev => ({ ...prev, [fileId]: 0 }));

      await uploadWithProgress(file, (progress) => {
        setUploadProgress(prev => ({ ...prev, [fileId]: progress }));
      });

      setUploadProgress(prev => {
        const newProgress = { ...prev };
        delete newProgress[fileId];
        return newProgress;
      });
    }
  };

  const uploadWithProgress = (file, onProgress) => {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
      const formData = new FormData();
      formData.append('file', file);

      xhr.upload.onprogress = (e) => {
        if (e.lengthComputable) {
          const progress = Math.round((e.loaded / e.total) * 100);
          onProgress(progress);
        }
      };

      xhr.onload = () => {
        if (xhr.status >= 200 && xhr.status < 300) {
          const response = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText);
          onChange?.(response.url);
          resolve(response.url);
        } else {
          reject(new Error('Upload failed'));
        }
      };

      xhr.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Upload failed'));
      xhr.open('POST', '/api/upload');
      xhr.send(formData);
    });
  };

  return (
    <div
      className={`drag-drop-uploader ${isDragging ? 'dragging' : ''}`}
      onDragEnter={handleDragEnter}
      onDragLeave={handleDragLeave}
      onDragOver={handleDragOver}
      onDrop={handleDrop}
    >
      <div className="upload-content">
        <div className="icon">📁</div>
        <div className="text">拖拽图片到此处上传</div>
        <div className="or">或</div>
        <button onClick={() => document.getElementById('drag-file-input').click()}>
          选择文件
        </button>
      </div>
      <input
        id="drag-file-input"
        type="file"
        accept="image/*"
        multiple
        onChange={handleFileInput}
        style={{ display: 'none' }}
      />
      {Object.keys(uploadProgress).length > 0 && (
        <div className="progress-list">
          {Object.entries(uploadProgress).map(([fileId, progress]) => (
            <div key={fileId} className="progress-item">
              <progress value={progress} max="100" />
              <span>{progress}%</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

面试考察点：

  • 文件上传的基本原理
  • FormData 的使用
  • XMLHttpRequest 的进度事件
  • 图片预览的实现
  • 拖拽 API 的使用

常见追问：

  • 如何实现秒传（根据 MD5）？
  • 如何处理上传失败重试？
  • 如何限制并发上传数量？

6.8 百度/高德地图集成

// 百度地图组件
function BaiduMap({ center = [116.404, 39.915], zoom = 15, markers = [], onMapClick }) {
  const mapRef = useRef(null);
  const mapInstanceRef = useRef(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    // 加载百度地图 SDK
    const script = document.createElement('script');
    script.src = `https://api.map.baidu.com/api?v=1.0&type=webgl&ak=YOUR_AK`;
    script.onload = initMap;
    document.body.appendChild(script);

    return () => {
      if (mapInstanceRef.current) {
        mapInstanceRef.current = null;
      }
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (mapInstanceRef.current && center) {
      mapInstanceRef.current.centerAndZoom(
        new BMapGL.Point(center[0], center[1]),
        zoom
      );
    }
  }, [center, zoom]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!mapInstanceRef.current) return;

    // 清除原有标记
    mapInstanceRef.current.clearOverlays();

    // 添加新标记
    markers.forEach(marker => {
      const point = new BMapGL.Point(marker.position[0], marker.position[1]);
      const bmapMarker = new BMapGL.Marker(point);

      if (marker.title) {
        const infoWindow = new BMapGL.InfoWindow(marker.title);
        bmapMarker.addEventListener('click', () => {
          mapInstanceRef.current.openInfoWindow(infoWindow, point);
        });
      }

      mapInstanceRef.current.addOverlay(bmapMarker);
    });
  }, [markers]);

  const initMap = () => {
    if (!mapRef.current) return;

    const map = new BMapGL.Map(mapRef.current);
    map.centerAndZoom(new BMapGL.Point(center[0], center[1]), zoom);
    map.enableScrollWheelZoom(true);

    mapInstanceRef.current = map;

    // 点击事件
    if (onMapClick) {
      map.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        onMapClick([e.lnglat.lng, e.lnglat.lat]);
      });
    }
  };

  return <div ref={mapRef} style={{ width: '100%', height: '400px' }} />;
}

// 高德地图组件
function AMap({ center = [116.397428, 39.90923], zoom = 15, markers = [], onMapClick }) {
  const mapRef = useRef(null);
  const mapInstanceRef = useRef(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const script = document.createElement('script');
    script.src = `https://webapi.amap.com/maps?v=2.0&key=YOUR_KEY`;
    script.onload = initMap;
    document.body.appendChild(script);

    return () => {
      if (mapInstanceRef.current) {
        mapInstanceRef.current = null;
      }
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (mapInstanceRef.current) {
      mapInstanceRef.current.setCenter(center);
      mapInstanceRef.current.setZoom(zoom);
    }
  }, [center, zoom]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!mapInstanceRef.current) return;

    // 清除原有标记
    mapInstanceRef.current.clearMap();

    // 添加新标记
    markers.forEach(marker => {
      const amapMarker = new AMap.Marker({
        position: new AMap.LngLat(marker.position[0], marker.position[1]),
        title: marker.title
      });

      if (marker.content) {
        amapMarker.setContent(marker.content);
      }

      mapInstanceRef.current.add(amapMarker);
    });
  }, [markers]);

  const initMap = () => {
    if (!mapRef.current) return;

    const map = new AMap.Map(mapRef.current, {
      center,
      zoom,
      viewMode: '2D'
    });

    mapInstanceRef.current = map;

    if (onMapClick) {
      map.on('click', (e) => {
        onMapClick([e.lnglat.getLng(), e.lnglat.getLat()]);
      });
    }
  };

  return <div ref={mapRef} style={{ width: '100%', height: '400px' }} />;
}

// 定位功能
function useGeolocation() {
  const [location, setLocation] = useState(null);
  const [error, setError] = useState(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const getLocation = useCallback((options = {}) => {
    if (!navigator.geolocation) {
      setError('浏览器不支持定位');
      return;
    }

    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);

    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
      (position) => {
        setLocation({
          longitude: position.coords.longitude,
          latitude: position.coords.latitude,
          accuracy: position.coords.accuracy
        });
        setLoading(false);
      },
      (err) => {
        setError(err.message);
        setLoading(false);
      },
      {
        enableHighAccuracy: true,
        timeout: 10000,
        maximumAge: 0,
        ...options
      }
    );
  }, []);

  const watchPosition = useCallback((callback) => {
    if (!navigator.geolocation) {
      return null;
    }

    const watchId = navigator.geolocation.watchPosition(
      (position) => {
        callback({
          longitude: position.coords.longitude,
          latitude: position.coords.latitude,
          accuracy: position.coords.accuracy
        });
      },
      (err) => console.error(err),
      { enableHighAccuracy: true }
    );

    return () => navigator.geolocation.clearWatch(watchId);
  }, []);

  return { location, error, loading, getLocation, watchPosition };
}

// 坐标转换工具
const CoordTransform = {
  // 百度坐标系转高德坐标系
  baiduToAmap: (lng, lat) => {
    // 转换算法（简化版）
    const x = lng - 0.0065;
    const y = lat - 0.006;
    return [x, y];
  },

  // 高德坐标系转百度坐标系
  amapToBaidu: (lng, lat) => {
    const x = lng + 0.0065;
    const y = lat + 0.006;
    return [x, y];
  },

  // GPS坐标转百度坐标
  gpsToBaidu: (lng, lat) => {
    // 需要调用百度地图 API 进行转换
    return [lng, lat];
  },

  // 坐标距离计算（米）
  getDistance: (lng1, lat1, lng2, lat2) => {
    const R = 6371000; // 地球半径（米）
    const dLat = (lat2 - lat1) * Math.PI / 180;
    const dLon = (lng2 - lng1) * Math.PI / 180;
    const a = Math.sin(dLat / 2) * Math.sin(dLat / 2) +
              Math.cos(lat1 * Math.PI / 180) * Math.cos(lat2 * Math.PI / 180) *
              Math.sin(dLon / 2) * Math.sin(dLon / 2);
    const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));
    return R * c;
  }
};

// 使用示例
function MapSelector() {
  const [center, setCenter] = useState([116.397428, 39.90923]);
  const [markers, setMarkers] = useState([]);
  const { location, getLocation } = useGeolocation();

  const handleMapClick = (lngLat) => {
    setMarkers([...markers, { position: lngLat, title: '新标记' }]);
    setCenter(lngLat);
  };

  const handleLocate = () => {
    getLocation({
      enableHighAccuracy: true,
      timeout: 10000
    });
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (location) {
      // GPS坐标转百度坐标
      const [lng, lat] = CoordTransform.gpsToBaidu(location.longitude, location.latitude);
      setCenter([lng, lat]);
      setMarkers([{ position: [lng, lat], title: '我的位置' }]);
    }
  }, [location]);

  return (
    <div>
      <button onClick={handleLocate}>定位</button>
      <AMap
        center={center}
        zoom={16}
        markers={markers}
        onMapClick={handleMapClick}
      />
    </div>
  );
}

面试考察点：

  • 地图 SDK 的使用
  • 坐标系的概念和转换
  • 定位 API 的使用
  • 地图交互事件处理

常见追问：

  • GPS、百度、高德坐标系的区别？
  • 如何实现周边搜索？
  • 如何绘制路线？

6.9 微信/支付宝支付集成

// 支付状态
const PaymentStatus = {
  PENDING: 'pending',
  SUCCESS: 'success',
  FAILED: 'failed',
  CANCELLED: 'cancelled'
};

// 微信支付
function WechatPay({ orderInfo, onSuccess, onFailed, onCancel }) {
  const [status, setStatus] = useState(PaymentStatus.PENDING);
  const [qrCodeUrl, setQrCodeUrl] = useState('');
  const [pollingTimer, setPollingTimer] = useState(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    initPayment();
    return () => {
      if (pollingTimer) {
        clearInterval(pollingTimer);
      }
    };
  }, []);

  const initPayment = async () => {
    try {
      // 1. 调用后端接口获取支付参数
      const { prepay_id, qr_code } = await requestWechatPay(orderInfo);

      // 2. 显示二维码
      setQrCodeUrl(qr_code);

      // 3. 开始轮询支付结果
      startPolling(prepay_id);
    } catch (error) {
      setStatus(PaymentStatus.FAILED);
      onFailed?.(error);
    }
  };

  const startPolling = (prepayId) => {
    const timer = setInterval(async () => {
      try {
        const result = await checkPaymentStatus(prepayId);

        if (result.status === 'success') {
          clearInterval(timer);
          setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);
          onSuccess?.(result);
        } else if (result.status === 'cancelled') {
          clearInterval(timer);
          setStatus(PaymentStatus.CANCELLED);
          onCancel?.();
        }
        // pending 继续轮询
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('轮询支付状态失败', error);
      }
    }, 2000);

    setPollingTimer(timer);
  };

  const requestWechatPay = async (orderInfo) => {
    const response = await fetch('/api/payment/wechat', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(orderInfo)
    });
    return response.json();
  };

  const checkPaymentStatus = async (prepayId) => {
    const response = await fetch(`/api/payment/status/${prepayId}`);
    return response.json();
  };

  return (
    <div className="wechat-pay">
      {status === PaymentStatus.PENDING && (
        <>
          <div className="qr-code">
            {qrCodeUrl && <img src={qrCodeUrl} alt="支付二维码" />}
          </div>
          <div className="hint">请使用微信扫描二维码支付</div>
        </>
      )}
      {status === PaymentStatus.SUCCESS && (
        <div className="success">支付成功</div>
      )}
      {status === PaymentStatus.FAILED && (
        <div className="failed">支付失败</div>
      )}
      {status === PaymentStatus.CANCELLED && (
        <div className="cancelled">已取消支付</div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// 支付宝支付
function Alipay({ orderInfo, onSuccess, onFailed, onCancel }) {
  const [status, setStatus] = useState(PaymentStatus.PENDING);

  useEffect(() => {
    initPayment();
  }, []);

  const initPayment = async () => {
    try {
      // 1. 获取支付表单
      const { form } = await requestAlipay(orderInfo);

      // 2. 渲染支付表单（支付宝会自动提交）
      const div = document.createElement('div');
      div.innerHTML = form;
      document.body.appendChild(div);
      div.querySelector('form').submit();

      // 3. 监听支付结果
      startPolling();
    } catch (error) {
      setStatus(PaymentStatus.FAILED);
      onFailed?.(error);
    }
  };

  const requestAlipay = async (orderInfo) => {
    const response = await fetch('/api/payment/alipay', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(orderInfo)
    });
    return response.json();
  };

  const startPolling = () => {
    const orderNo = orderInfo.orderNo;
    const timer = setInterval(async () => {
      try {
        const result = await checkPaymentStatus(orderNo);

        if (result.status === 'success') {
          clearInterval(timer);
          setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);
          onSuccess?.(result);
        } else if (result.status === 'cancelled') {
          clearInterval(timer);
          setStatus(PaymentStatus.CANCELLED);
          onCancel?.();
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('轮询支付状态失败', error);
      }
    }, 2000);
  };

  const checkPaymentStatus = async (orderNo) => {
    const response = await fetch(`/api/payment/status/${orderNo}`);
    return response.json();
  };

  return (
    <div className="alipay">
      {status === PaymentStatus.PENDING && (
        <div className="loading">正在跳转支付宝...</div>
      )}
      {status === PaymentStatus.SUCCESS && (
        <div className="success">支付成功</div>
      )}
      {status === PaymentStatus.FAILED && (
        <div className="failed">支付失败</div>
      )}
      {status === PaymentStatus.CANCELLED && (
        <div className="cancelled">已取消支付</div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// 通用支付组件
function PaymentModal({ visible, orderInfo, paymentType, onClose }) {
  const [status, setStatus] = useState(PaymentStatus.PENDING);

  const handleSuccess = (result) => {
    setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);
    // 延迟关闭，让用户看到成功提示
    setTimeout(() => {
      onClose?.(result);
    }, 2000);
  };

  const handleFailed = (error) => {
    setStatus(PaymentStatus.FAILED);
  };

  const handleCancel = () => {
    setStatus(PaymentStatus.CANCELLED);
  };

  if (!visible) return null;

  return (
    <div className="payment-modal">
      <div className="payment-content">
        <h3>订单支付</h3>
        <div className="order-info">
          <p>订单号: {orderInfo.orderNo}</p>
          <p>金额: ¥{orderInfo.amount}</p>
        </div>

        {paymentType === 'wechat' && (
          <WechatPay
            orderInfo={orderInfo}
            onSuccess={handleSuccess}
            onFailed={handleFailed}
            onCancel={handleCancel}
          />
        )}

        {paymentType === 'alipay' && (
          <Alipay
            orderInfo={orderInfo}
            onSuccess={handleSuccess}
            onFailed={handleFailed}
            onCancel={handleCancel}
          />
        )}

        <button className="close-btn" onClick={onClose}>关闭</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// 支付结果轮询 Hook
function usePaymentPolling(orderNo, options = {}) {
  const { interval = 2000, maxAttempts = 30, onSuccess, onFailed, onCancel } = options;
  const [status, setStatus] = useState(PaymentStatus.PENDING);
  const [attempts, setAttempts] = useState(0);

  const startPolling = useCallback(() => {
    let timer;
    let currentAttempts = 0;

    const poll = async () => {
      currentAttempts++;
      setAttempts(currentAttempts);

      if (currentAttempts >= maxAttempts) {
        clearInterval(timer);
        setStatus(PaymentStatus.FAILED);
        onFailed?.(new Error('支付超时'));
        return;
      }

      try {
        const result = await checkPaymentStatus(orderNo);

        if (result.status === 'success') {
          clearInterval(timer);
          setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);
          onSuccess?.(result);
        } else if (result.status === 'cancelled') {
          clearInterval(timer);
          setStatus(PaymentStatus.CANCELLED);
          onCancel?.();
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('轮询失败', error);
      }
    };

    timer = setInterval(poll, interval);
    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, [orderNo, interval, maxAttempts, onSuccess, onFailed, onCancel]);

  return { status, attempts, startPolling };
}

面试考察点：

  • 支付流程的理解
  • 轮询机制的实现
  • 支付安全注意事项
  • 状态管理和错误处理

常见追问：

  • 如何防止重复支付？
  • 支付失败如何处理？
  • 如何保证轮询的可靠性？

6.10 聊天功能（表情选择器、消息状态、输入状态）

// 表情选择器
function EmojiPicker({ onSelect, onClose }) {
  const [category, setCategory] = useState('smileys');
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');

  const emojiCategories = {
    smileys: ['😀', '😃', '😄', '😁', '😆', '😅', '😂', '🤣', '😊', '😇', '🙂', '😉', '😌', '😍', '🥰', '😘', '😗', '😙', '😚', '😋', '😛', '😜', '🤪', '😝', '🤑', '🤗', '🤭', '🤫', '🤔', '🤐', '🤨', '😐', '😑', '😶', '😏', '😒', '🙄', '😬', '😮', '🥺', '😢', '😭', '😤', '😠', '😡', '🤬'],
    animals: ['🐶', '🐱', '🐭', '🐹', '🐰', '🦊', '🐻', '🐼', '🐨', '🐯', '🦁', '🐮', '🐷', '🐸', '🐵', '🐔', '🐧', '🐦', '🐤', '🦆', '🦅', '🦉', '🦇', '🐺', '🐗', '🐴', '🦄', '🐝', '🐛', '🦋', '🐌', '🐞', '🐜', '🦟', '🦗', '🕷️', '🦂', '🐢', '🐍', '🦎'],
    food: ['🍎', '🍐', '🍊', '🍋', '🍌', '🍉', '🍇', '🍓', '🫐', '🍈', '🍒', '🍑', '🥭', '🍍', '🥥', '🥝', '🍅', '🍆', '🥑', '🥦', '🥬', '🥒', '🌶️', '🫑', '🌽', '🥕', '🧄', '🧅', '🥔', '🍠', '🥐', '🥯', '🍞', '🥖', '🥨', '🧀', '🥚', '🍳', '🧈'],
    activities: ['⚽', '🏀', '🏈', '⚾', '🥎', '🎾', '🏐', '🏉', '🥏', '🎱', '🪀', '🏓', '🏸', '🏒', '🏑', '🥍', '🏏', '🪃', '🥅', '⛳', '🪁', '🏹', '🎣', '🤿', '🥊', '🥋', '🎽', '🛹', '🛼', '🛷', '⛸️', '🥌', '🎿', '⛷️', '🏂', '🪂', '🏋️', '🤼', '🤸', '🤺', '⛹️'],
    objects: ['⌚', '📱', '💻', '⌨️', '🖥️', '🖨️', '🖱️', '🖲️', '💽', '💾', '💿', '📀', '📼', '📷', '📸', '📹', '🎥', '📞', '☎️', '📟', '📠', '📺', '📻', '🎙️', '🎚️', '🎛️', '🧭', '⏱️', '⏲️', '⏰', '🕰️', '💡', '🔦', '🕯️', '🪔', '🧯', '🛢️', '💸', '💵', '💴'],
    symbols: ['❤️', '🧡', '💛', '💚', '💙', '💜', '🖤', '🤍', '🤎', '💔', '❤️‍🔥', '❤️‍🩹', '❣️', '💕', '💞', '💓', '💗', '💖', '💘', '💝', '💟', '☮️', '✝️', '☪️', '🕉️', '☸️', '✡️', '🔯', '🕎', '☯️', '☦️', '🛐', '⛎', '♈', '♉', '♊', '♋', '♌', '♍', '♎']
  };

  const filteredEmojis = search
    ? Object.values(emojiCategories).flat().filter(() => true) // 实际应实现搜索
    : emojiCategories[category] || [];

  return (
    <div className="emoji-picker">
      <div className="emoji-search">
        <input
          type="text"
          placeholder="搜索表情"
          value={search}
          onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
        />
      </div>

      {!search && (
        <div className="emoji-categories">
          {Object.keys(emojiCategories).map(cat => (
            <button
              key={cat}
              className={category === cat ? 'active' : ''}
              onClick={() => setCategory(cat)}
            >
              {cat === 'smileys' ? '😀' : cat === 'animals' ? '🐶' : cat === 'food' ? '🍎' : cat === 'activities' ? '⚽' : '⌚'}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="emoji-grid">
        {filteredEmojis.map((emoji, index) => (
          <button
            key={index}
            className="emoji-item"
            onClick={() => onSelect(emoji)}
          >
            {emoji}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// 消息已读/未读状态
function MessageStatus({ status }) {
  const statusConfig = {
    sending: { icon: '⏳', text: '发送中', color: '#999' },
    sent: { icon: '✓', text: '已发送', color: '#999' },
    delivered: { icon: '✓✓', text: '已送达', color: '#999' },
    read: { icon: '✓✓', text: '已读', color: '#4CAF50' },
    failed: { icon: '!', text: '发送失败', color: '#f44336' }
  };

  const config = statusConfig[status] || statusConfig.sending;

  return (
    <span className={`message-status ${status}`} title={config.text}>
      {config.icon}
    </span>
  );
}

// 消息撤回功能
function useMessageRecall(messages, onRecall) {
  const [recallableTime] = useState(2 * 60 * 1000); // 2分钟内可撤回

  const canRecall = useCallback((message) => {
    if (message.status !== 'sent' && message.status !== 'delivered') {
      return false;
    }
    const elapsed = Date.now() - message.timestamp;
    return elapsed <= recallableTime;
  }, [recallableTime]);

  const recallMessage = useCallback(async (messageId) => {
    const message = messages.find(m => m.id === messageId);
    if (!canRecall(message)) {
      throw new Error('消息已超过可撤回时间');
    }

    await onRecall(messageId);
  }, [messages, canRecall, onRecall]);

  return { canRecall, recallMessage };
}

// 对方正在输入状态
function useTypingStatus(roomId, socket) {
  const [typingUsers, setTypingUsers] = useState([]);
  const typingTimeoutRef = useRef({});

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!socket) return;

    socket.on('user_typing', ({ userId, userName, isTyping }) => {
      setTypingUsers(prev => {
        if (isTyping) {
          // 添加用户
          if (!prev.find(u => u.userId === userId)) {
            return [...prev, { userId, userName }];
          }
          return prev;
        } else {
          // 移除用户
          return prev.filter(u => u.userId !== userId);
        }
      });

      // 自动清除（防止对方异常离线）
      if (isTyping) {
        if (typingTimeoutRef.current[userId]) {
          clearTimeout(typingTimeoutRef.current[userId]);
        }
        typingTimeoutRef.current[userId] = setTimeout(() => {
          setTypingUsers(prev => prev.filter(u => u.userId !== userId));
        }, 3000);
      }
    });

    return () => {
      Object.values(typingTimeoutRef.current).forEach(clearTimeout);
    };
  }, [socket]);

  const sendTypingStatus = useCallback((isTyping) => {
    socket?.emit('typing', { roomId, isTyping });
  }, [socket, roomId]);

  // 防抖发送 typing 状态
  const debouncedSendTyping = useMemo(
    () => debounce(sendTypingStatus, 500),
    [sendTypingStatus]
  );

  const handleInputChange = (value) => {
    if (value) {
      debouncedSendTyping(true);
    }
  };

  return { typingUsers, handleInputChange };
}

// 完整聊天输入组件
function ChatInput({ onSendMessage, disabled }) {
  const [message, setMessage] = useState('');
  const [showEmoji, setShowEmoji] = useState(false);

  const handleSend = () => {
    if (message.trim() && !disabled) {
      onSendMessage(message.trim());
      setMessage('');
      setShowEmoji(false);
    }
  };

  const handleKeyPress = (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
      e.preventDefault();
      handleSend();
    }
  };

  const handleEmojiSelect = (emoji) => {
    setMessage(prev => prev + emoji);
  };

  return (
    <div className="chat-input">
      <div className="input-tools">
        <button onClick={() => setShowEmoji(!showEmoji)}>😀</button>
        <button disabled={disabled}>📎</button>
        <button disabled={disabled}>📷</button>
      </div>

      <textarea
        value={message}
        onChange={(e) => setMessage(e.target.value)}
        onKeyPress={handleKeyPress}
        placeholder="输入消息..."
        disabled={disabled}
        rows={1}
      />

      {showEmoji && (
        <div className="emoji-popup">
          <EmojiPicker
            onSelect={handleEmojiSelect}
            onClose={() => setShowEmoji(false)}
          />
        </div>
      )}

      <button className="send-btn" onClick={handleSend} disabled={!message.trim() || disabled}>
        发送
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}

// 消息组件
function Message({ message, isMine, onRecall }) {
  const [showActions, setShowActions] = useState(false);
  const { canRecall, recallMessage } = useMessageRecall(
    [message],
    onRecall
  );

  const handleRecall = async () => {
    try {
      await recallMessage(message.id);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error.message);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div
      className={`message ${isMine ? 'mine' : 'theirs'}`}
      onMouseEnter={() => setShowActions(true)}
      onMouseLeave={() => setShowActions(false)}
    >
      <div className="message-content">
        {message.type === 'text' && message.content}
        {message.type === 'image' && <img src={message.url} alt="" />}
        {message.type === 'recall' && <span className="recalled">消息已撤回</span>}
      </div>

      <div className="message-meta">
        {isMine && <MessageStatus status={message.status} />}
        <span className="time">{formatTime(message.timestamp)}</span>
      </div>

      {showActions && isMine && message.type !== 'recall' && (
        <div className="message-actions">
          {canRecall(message) && (
            <button onClick={handleRecall}>撤回</button>
          )}
          <button>复制</button>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatTime(timestamp) {
  const date = new Date(timestamp);
  const now = new Date();
  const isToday = date.toDateString() === now.toDateString();

  if (isToday) {
    return date.toLocaleTimeString('zh-CN', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
  } else {
    return date.toLocaleDateString('zh-CN', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' }) + ' ' +
           date.toLocaleTimeString('zh-CN', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
  }
}

面试考察点：

  • 表情选择器的实现
  • 消息状态管理
  • 实时通信状态同步
  • 轮询 vs WebSocket

常见追问：

  • 如何实现消息未读数？
  • 如何处理消息乱序？
  • 如何实现@功能？

6.11 模糊搜索实现

// 模糊搜索工具函数
const FuzzySearch = {
  // 简单的模糊匹配
  match: (text, query) => {
    if (!query) return true;
    if (!text) return false;

    const textLower = text.toLowerCase();
    const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();

    let queryIndex = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < textLower.length && queryIndex < queryLower.length; i++) {
      if (textLower[i] === queryLower[queryIndex]) {
        queryIndex++;
      }
    }

    return queryIndex === queryLower.length;
  },

  // 获取匹配位置
  matchPositions: (text, query) => {
    if (!query) return [];

    const positions = [];
    const textLower = text.toLowerCase();
    const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();

    let queryIndex = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < textLower.length && queryIndex < queryLower.length; i++) {
      if (textLower[i] === queryLower[queryIndex]) {
        positions.push(i);
        queryIndex++;
      }
    }

    return positions;
  },

  // 拼音匹配（需要 pinyin 库）
  matchPinyin: (text, query) => {
    if (!query) return true;

    const pinyinText = pinyin(text, { style: pinyin.STYLE_NORMAL }).join('');
    const pinyinQuery = pinyin(query, { style: pinyin.STYLE_NORMAL }).join('');

    return FuzzySearch.match(pinyinText, pinyinQuery);
  },

  // 带权重的模糊搜索
  search: (items, query, options = {}) => {
    const { keys = ['name'], threshold = 0.3 } = options;
    if (!query) return items;

    const results = items
      .map(item => {
        let maxScore = 0;

        for (const key of keys) {
          const value = item[key];
          if (!value) continue;

          // 计算相似度分数
          const score = FuzzySearch.calculateScore(value, query);
          maxScore = Math.max(maxScore, score);
        }

        return { item, score: maxScore };
      })
      .filter(r => r.score > threshold)
      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score);

    return results.map(r => r.item);
  },

  // 计算相似度分数
  calculateScore: (text, query) => {
    const textLower = text.toLowerCase();
    const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();

    // 完全匹配
    if (textLower === queryLower) return 1;

    // 开头匹配
    if (textLower.startsWith(queryLower)) return 0.9;

    // 包含匹配
    if (textLower.includes(queryLower)) return 0.8;

    // 模糊匹配
    const positions = FuzzySearch.matchPositions(text, query);
    if (positions.length === queryLower.length) {
      // 连续匹配得分更高
      let consecutive = 0;
      let maxConsecutive = 0;
      for (let i = 1; i < positions.length; i++) {
        if (positions[i] - positions[i - 1] === 1) {
          consecutive++;
          maxConsecutive = Math.max(maxConsecutive, consecutive);
        } else {
          consecutive = 0;
        }
      }
      return 0.5 + maxConsecutive * 0.1;
    }

    return 0;
  }
};

// 搜索历史记录 Hook
function useSearchHistory(maxItems = 10) {
  const [history, setHistory] = useState(() => {
    try {
      return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('search_history') || '[]');
    } catch {
      return [];
    }
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    localStorage.setItem('search_history', JSON.stringify(history));
  }, [history]);

  const addToHistory = useCallback((query) => {
    if (!query.trim()) return;

    setHistory(prev => {
      // 去除重复项
      const filtered = prev.filter(item => item !== query);
      // 添加到开头
      const newHistory = [query, ...filtered];
      // 限制数量
      return newHistory.slice(0, maxItems);
    });
  }, [maxItems]);

  const removeFromHistory = useCallback((query) => {
    setHistory(prev => prev.filter(item => item !== query));
  }, []);

  const clearHistory = useCallback(() => {
    setHistory([]);
  }, []);

  return { history, addToHistory, removeFromHistory, clearHistory };
}

// 高亮搜索结果
function HighlightedText({ text, query }) {
  if (!query || !text) return <span>{text}</span>;

  const positions = FuzzySearch.matchPositions(text, query);
  if (positions.length === 0) return <span>{text}</span>;

  const parts = [];
  let lastIndex = 0;

  positions.forEach((pos, i) => {
    // 添加匹配前的文本
    if (pos > lastIndex) {
      parts.push(text.slice(lastIndex, pos));
    }
    // 添加匹配的高亮文本
    parts.push(
      <mark key={i} style={{ backgroundColor: '#ffe600', padding: '0 2px' }}>
        {text[pos]}
      </mark>
    );
    lastIndex = pos + 1;
  });

  // 添加最后一段文本
  if (lastIndex < text.length) {
    parts.push(text.slice(lastIndex));
  }

  return <span>{parts}</span>;
}

// 搜索组件
function FuzzySearchInput({ data, onSearch }) {
  const [query, setQuery] = useState('');
  const [results, setResults] = useState([]);
  const [showResults, setShowResults] = useState(false);
  const { history, addToHistory } = useSearchHistory();

  // 防抖搜索
  const debouncedSearch = useMemo(
    () => debounce((searchQuery) => {
      if (!searchQuery.trim()) {
        setResults([]);
        return;
      }

      const searchResults = FuzzySearch.search(data, searchQuery, {
        keys: ['name', 'description', 'tags'],
        threshold: 0.2
      });
      setResults(searchResults);
    }, 300),
    [data]
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    debouncedSearch(query);
  }, [query, debouncedSearch]);

  const handleSelect = (item) => {
    addToHistory(query);
    onSearch?.(item);
    setShowResults(false);
  };

  const handleHistoryClick = (historyQuery) => {
    setQuery(historyQuery);
    debouncedSearch(historyQuery);
  };

  return (
    <div className="fuzzy-search">
      <input
        type="text"
        value={query}
        onChange={(e) => {
          setQuery(e.target.value);
          setShowResults(true);
        }}
        onFocus={() => setShowResults(true)}
        onBlur={() => setTimeout(() => setShowResults(false), 200)}
        placeholder="搜索..."
      />

      {showResults && (
        <div className="search-dropdown">
          {/* 搜索历史 */}
          {query === '' && history.length > 0 && (
            <div className="search-history">
              <div className="section-title">最近搜索</div>
              {history.map((item, index) => (
                <div
                  key={index}
                  className="history-item"
                  onClick={() => handleHistoryClick(item)}
                >
                  {item}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* 搜索结果 */}
          {query !== '' && results.length > 0 && (
            <div className="search-results">
              {results.map(item => (
                <div
                  key={item.id}
                  className="result-item"
                  onClick={() => handleSelect(item)}
                >
                  <div className="result-name">
                    <HighlightedText text={item.name} query={query} />
                  </div>
                  {item.description && (
                    <div className="result-desc">
                      <HighlightedText text={item.description} query={query} />
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* 无结果 */}
          {query !== '' && results.length === 0 && (
            <div className="no-results">未找到相关结果</div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

面试考察点：

  • 模糊匹配算法
  • 性能优化（大数据量）
  • 搜索体验优化

常见追问：

  • 如何实现拼音搜索？
  • 如何处理特殊字符？
  • 如何实现搜索建议？

7.1 HTML5 新增语义化标签

7.1.1 核心语义化标签

HTML5 引入了大量语义化标签，使页面结构更清晰、更易于理解和维护。

标签 语义 典型应用场景
<header> 页面或区块的头部 导航栏、标题区域
<footer> 页面或区块的底部 版权信息、联系方式
<nav> 导航链接区域 主导航菜单
<main> 页面主要内容 文章主体、核心功能区
<article> 独立完整的内容 博客文章、新闻报道
<section> 主题分组的内容 章节、页面分区
<aside> 侧边栏相关内容 广告、相关链接
<figure> 独立的流内容 图片、图表
<figcaption> figure 的标题 图片说明

代码示例：

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>语义化标签示例</title>
</head>
<body>
  <header>
    <nav>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="/">首页</a></li>
        <li><a href="/about">关于</a></li>
      </ul>
    </nav>
  </header>

  <main>
    <article>
      <header>
        <h1>文章标题</h1>
        <time datetime="2024-01-01">2024年1月1日</time>
      </header>
      <section>
        <p>文章第一段...</p>
      </section>
      <section>
        <p>文章第二段...</p>
      </section>
      <footer>
        <p>作者：张三</p>
      </footer>
    </article>

    <aside>
      <h2>相关文章</h2>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="#">相关文章1</a></li>
        <li><a href="#">相关文章2</a></li>
      </ul>
    </aside>
  </main>

  <figure>
    <img src="chart.png" alt="数据图表">
    <figcaption>图1：2024年销售数据</figcaption>
  </figure>

  <footer>
    <p>&copy; 2024 公司名称</p>
  </footer>
</body>
</html>

面试考察点：

  • 语义化标签与 <div> 的区别
  • 何时使用 <section> vs <article>
  • 语义化对 SEO 的影响
  • 语义化标签的浏览器兼容性处理

常见追问：

  • <section> 和 <article> 的区别是什么？
  • 为什么建议使用语义化标签而不是大量 <div>？
  • 语义化标签在 SEO 中有什么作用？

7.2 HTML5 新增表单属性

7.2.1 input 新类型

HTML5 为 <input> 增加了多种类型，提供了内置的客户端验证功能。

<!-- 邮箱 -->
<input type="email" name="email" placeholder="请输入邮箱">

<!-- URL -->
<input type="url" name="website" placeholder="https://example.com">

<!-- 电话（移动端唤起数字键盘） -->
<input type="tel" name="phone" placeholder="请输入手机号">

<!-- 数字 -->
<input type="number" name="age" min="0" max="150" step="1">

<!-- 范围滑块 -->
<input type="range" name="volume" min="0" max="100" value="50">

<!-- 日期 -->
<input type="date" name="birthday">
<input type="month" name="birth-month">
<input type="week" name="birth-week">

<!-- 时间 -->
<input type="time" name="appointment-time">
<input type="datetime-local" name="appointment-datetime">

<!-- 颜色选择器 -->
<input type="color" name="theme-color">

代码示例 - 表单验证：

<form id="registerForm">
  <div>
    <label>用户名：</label>
    <input
      type="text"
      name="username"
      required
      minlength="3"
      maxlength="20"
      pattern="^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+{{CONTENT}}quot;
      placeholder="3-20位字母数字下划线"
    >
  </div>

  <div>
    <label>邮箱：</label>
    <input type="email" name="email" required>
  </div>

  <div>
    <label>密码：</label>
    <input
      type="password"
      name="password"
      required
      minlength="8"
      pattern="^(?=.*[a-z])(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*\d).{8,}{{CONTENT}}quot;
      placeholder="至少8位，包含大小写字母和数字"
    >
  </div>

  <div>
    <label>验证码：</label>
    <input type="text" name="captcha" required pattern="^\d{4}{{CONTENT}}quot; maxlength="4">
  </div>

  <!-- 关闭表单验证 -->
  <button type="submit" formnovalidate>提交（不验证）</button>
  <button type="submit">提交（验证）</button>
</form>

<!-- 关联外部表单控件 -->
<input type="email" form="registerForm" name="backup-email" placeholder="备用邮箱">

7.2.2 表单属性详解

<!-- placeholder - 占位提示 -->
<input type="text" placeholder="请输入姓名">

<!-- required - 必填项 -->
<input type="text" required>

<!-- pattern - 正则验证 -->
<input type="tel" pattern="^1[3-9]\d{9}{{CONTENT}}quot;>

<!-- autocomplete - 自动完成 -->
<input type="text" autocomplete="name">  <!-- 姓名 -->
<input type="email" autocomplete="email">  <!-- 邮箱 -->
<input type="tel" autocomplete="tel">  <!-- 电话 -->
<input type="password" autocomplete="new-password">  <!-- 新密码 -->

<!-- novalidate - 禁用验证 -->
<form novalidate>
  <input type="email">
</form>

<!-- form - 关联表单 -->
<input type="text" form="myForm">

<!-- multiple - 多文件/多值 -->
<input type="file" multiple>
<input type="email" multiple>  <!-- 多个邮箱，用逗号分隔 -->

<!-- disabled - 禁用 -->
<input type="text" disabled>

<!-- readonly - 只读 -->
<input type="text" readonly>

<!-- autofocus - 自动聚焦 -->
<input type="text" autofocus>

7.2.3 表单验证 API

// 获取表单元素
const form = document.getElementById('myForm');
const input = document.getElementById('username');

// checkValidity() - 检查是否有效
if (input.checkValidity()) {
  console.log('验证通过');
} else {
  console.log('验证失败:', input.validationMessage);
}

// validity 属性 - 获取验证状态
const validity = input.validity;
console.log({
  valueMissing: validity.valueMissing,    // 必填项为空
  typeMismatch: validity.typeMismatch,    // 类型不匹配
  patternMismatch: validity.patternMismatch,  // 正则不匹配
  tooLong: validity.tooLong,              // 长度过长
  tooShort: validity.tooShort,             // 长度过短
  rangeUnderflow: validity.rangeUnderflow, // 小于最小值
  rangeOverflow: validity.rangeOverflow,   // 大于最大值
  stepMismatch: validity.stepMismatch,     // 步长不匹配
  customError: validity.customError,        // 自定义错误
  valid: validity.valid                    // 是否有效
});

// setCustomValidity() - 自定义验证消息
input.addEventListener('input', function() {
  if (this.value === 'admin') {
    this.setCustomValidity('不能使用 admin 作为用户名');
  } else if (this.value.length < 3) {
    this.setCustomValidity('用户名至少3个字符');
  } else {
    this.setCustomValidity('');  // 清除自定义错误
  }
});

// 表单整体验证
form.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
  if (!form.checkValidity()) {
    e.preventDefault();
    // 显示所有错误
    const inputs = form.querySelectorAll('input, textarea, select');
    inputs.forEach(input => {
      if (!input.checkValidity()) {
        console.log(input.name + ': ' + input.validationMessage);
      }
    });
  }
});

// 监听验证状态变化
input.addEventListener('invalid', function(e) {
  console.log('验证失败:', e.target.validationMessage);
});

input.addEventListener('valid', function(e) {
  console.log('验证通过');
});

面试考察点：

  • HTML5 新增的 input 类型及适用场景
  • 表单验证的方式（HTML 属性 vs JavaScript API）
  • checkValidity() 与 reportValidity() 的区别
  • 自定义验证的实现方式

常见追问：

  • 如何自定义表单验证的错误提示样式？
  • input 事件的 validity 属性包含哪些状态？
  • 如何实现实时校验（输入时校验 vs 提交时校验）？

7.3 HTML5 新增 API

7.3.1 Drag and Drop API

// 可拖拽元素
draggableElement.addEventListener('dragstart', (e) => {
  // 设置传输数据
  e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', '要传递的数据');
  e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'copy';
});

// 目标容器
dropZone.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();  // 必须阻止默认行为才能触发 drop
  e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'copy';
});

dropZone.addEventListener('drop', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const data = e.dataTransfer.getData('text/plain');
  console.log('接收到的数据:', data);
});

// 拖拽事件
// dragstart - 开始拖拽
// drag - 拖拽过程中持续触发
// dragend - 拖拽结束
// dragenter - 进入目标区域
// dragover - 在目标区域上方移动
// dragleave - 离开目标区域
// drop - 放置

代码示例 - 文件拖拽上传：

const dropZone = document.getElementById('dropZone');

dropZone.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  dropZone.classList.add('drag-over');
});

dropZone.addEventListener('dragleave', (e) => {
  dropZone.classList.remove('drag-over');
});

dropZone.addEventListener('drop', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  dropZone.classList.remove('drag-over');

  const files = e.dataTransfer.files;
  if (files.length > 0) {
    uploadFiles(files);
  }
});

function uploadFiles(files) {
  Array.from(files).forEach(file => {
    console.log('文件名:', file.name);
    console.log('文件大小:', file.size);
    console.log('文件类型:', file.type);

    // 上传逻辑
    const formData = new FormData();
    formData.append('file', file);

    fetch('/upload', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: formData
    });
  });
}

7.3.2 File API

// input type="file" 获取文件
const fileInput = document.getElementById('fileInput');

fileInput.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
  const files = e.target.files;

  // 遍历文件
  for (let i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
    const file = files[i];
    console.log('文件名:', file.name);
    console.log('大小:', file.size, '字节');
    console.log('类型:', file.type);
    console.log('最后修改:', new Date(file.lastModified));
  }

  // FileReader 读取文件内容
  const reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = (e) => {
    console.log('文件内容:', e.target.result);
  };

  // 读取为文本
  // reader.readAsText(file);

  // 读取为 DataURL（图片预览）
  // reader.readAsDataURL(file);

  // 读取为 ArrayBuffer（二进制处理）
  // reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
});

// 图片预览示例
function previewImage(file) {
  return new Promise((resolve) => {
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = (e) => {
      resolve(e.target.result);
    };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });
}

// 大文件分片读取
function sliceFile(file, chunkSize = 1024 * 1024) {
  const chunks = [];
  let start = 0;

  while (start < file.size) {
    const chunk = file.slice(start, start + chunkSize);
    chunks.push(chunk);
    start += chunkSize;
  }

  return chunks;
}

7.3.3 History API

// pushState - 添加新历史记录
history.pushState({ page: 2 }, 'Page 2', '/page/2');

// replaceState - 替换当前历史记录
history.replaceState({ page: 1 }, 'Page 1', '/page/1');

// popstate 事件 - 浏览器前进/后退触发
window.addEventListener('popstate', (e) => {
  console.log('当前状态:', e.state);
  console.log('当前 URL:', location.href);
});

// 获取当前状态
const currentState = history.state;

// go / back / forward
history.go(-1);    // 后退一页
history.back();   // 后退
history.forward(); // 前进

代码示例 - 单页应用路由：

class Router {
  constructor() {
    this.routes = {};

    // 监听浏览器前进/后退
    window.addEventListener('popstate', () => {
      this.handleRoute();
    });
  }

  // 注册路由
  addRoute(path, handler) {
    this.routes[path] = handler;
  }

  // 跳转
  navigate(path) {
    history.pushState(null, '', path);
    this.handleRoute();
  }

  // 处理路由
  handleRoute() {
    const path = location.pathname;
    const handler = this.routes[path] || this.routes['*'];
    if (handler) {
      handler();
    }
  }

  // 初始化
  init() {
    // 处理页面首次加载
    if (!history.state) {
      history.replaceState({ path: location.pathname }, '', location.pathname);
    }
    this.handleRoute();

    // 拦截链接点击
    document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      const link = e.target.closest('a[data-link]');
      if (link) {
        e.preventDefault();
        this.navigate(link.href);
      }
    });
  }
}

// 使用
const router = new Router();

router.addRoute('/', () => {
  document.getElementById('app').innerHTML = '<h1>首页</h1>';
});

router.addRoute('/about', () => {
  document.getElementById('app').innerHTML = '<h1>关于</h1>';
});

router.addRoute('*', () => {
  document.getElementById('app').innerHTML = '<h1>404</h1>';
});

router.init();

7.3.4 LocalStorage / SessionStorage

// LocalStorage - 持久化存储
localStorage.setItem('username', '张三');
localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify({ id: 1, name: '张三' }));

const username = localStorage.getItem('username');
const user = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('user'));

// SessionStorage - 会话级存储（关闭浏览器后清除）
sessionStorage.setItem('tempData', 'some value');

// 存储对象（需要序列化）
const data = { name: 'test', value: 123 };
localStorage.setItem('key', JSON.stringify(data));
const parsed = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('key'));

// 移除
localStorage.removeItem('username');

// 清空
localStorage.clear();

// 获取存储容量
function getStorageInfo() {
  let total = 0;
  for (let key in localStorage) {
    if (localStorage.hasOwnProperty(key)) {
      total += localStorage[key].length + key.length;
    }
  }
  console.log('已使用:', (total / 1024).toFixed(2), 'KB');
}

// 存储事件（跨标签页通信）
window.addEventListener('storage', (e) => {
  console.log('键:', e.key);
  console.log('旧值:', e.oldValue);
  console.log('新值:', e.newValue);
  console.log('存储区域:', e.storageArea);
});

7.3.5 IndexedDB

// 打开数据库
const request = indexedDB.open('myDatabase', 1);

request.onerror = (event) => {
  console.error('数据库打开失败:', event.target.error);
};

request.onsuccess = (event) => {
  const db = event.target.result;
  console.log('数据库打开成功');
};

request.onupgradeneeded = (event) => {
  const db = event.target.result;

  // 创建对象仓库（类似于表）
  if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('users')) {
    const objectStore = db.createObjectStore('users', {
      keyPath: 'id',
      autoIncrement: true
    });

    // 创建索引
    objectStore.createIndex('name', 'name', { unique: false });
    objectStore.createIndex('email', 'email', { unique: true });
  }
};

// 增删改查操作
function operateDB() {
  const transaction = db.transaction(['users'], 'readwrite');
  const objectStore = transaction.objectStore('users');

  // 添加
  const addRequest = objectStore.add({ name: '张三', email: 'zhangsan@example.com' });
  addRequest.onsuccess = () => console.log('添加成功');

  // 查询
  const getRequest = objectStore.get(1);
  getRequest.onsuccess = () => console.log('查询结果:', getRequest.result);

  // 更新
  const updateRequest = objectStore.put({ id: 1, name: '李四', email: 'lisi@example.com' });
  updateRequest.onsuccess = () => console.log('更新成功');

  // 删除
  const deleteRequest = objectStore.delete(1);
  deleteRequest.onsuccess = () => console.log('删除成功');

  // 遍历所有
  const cursorRequest = objectStore.openCursor();
  cursorRequest.onsuccess = (event) => {
    const cursor = event.target.result;
    if (cursor) {
      console.log('记录:', cursor.value);
      cursor.continue();
    }
  };
}

7.3.6 Web Worker

// worker.js - Web Worker 文件
self.onmessage = function(e) {
  const data = e.data;

  // 模拟耗时计算
  const result = computeHeavyTask(data);

  // 发送结果回主线程
  self.postMessage(result);
};

function computeHeavyTask(data) {
  // 耗时计算...
  return data * 2;
}

// 主线程使用
const worker = new Worker('worker.js');

// 发送消息给 Worker
worker.postMessage({ type: 'compute', value: 100 });

// 接收 Worker 返回的消息
worker.onmessage = function(e) {
  console.log('Worker 返回结果:', e.data);
};

// 处理 Worker 错误
worker.onerror = function(e) {
  console.error('Worker 错误:', e.message);
};

// 终止 Worker
worker.terminate();

// 内联 Worker（无需外部文件）
const blob = new Blob([`
  self.onmessage = function(e) {
    self.postMessage(e.data * 2);
  };
`], { type: 'application/javascript' });

const worker = new Worker(URL.createObjectURL(blob));

7.3.7 Geolocation API

// 获取当前位置
if (navigator.geolocation) {
  navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
    (position) => {
      console.log('纬度:', position.coords.latitude);
      console.log('经度:', position.coords.longitude);
      console.log('精度:', position.coords.accuracy, '米');
      console.log('海拔:', position.coords.altitude);
      console.log('速度:', position.coords.speed);
    },
    (error) => {
      switch (error.code) {
        case error.PERMISSION_DENIED:
          console.error('用户拒绝定位');
          break;
        case error.POSITION_UNAVAILABLE:
          console.error('无法获取位置');
          break;
        case error.TIMEOUT:
          console.error('定位超时');
          break;
      }
    },
    {
      enableHighAccuracy: true,  // 高精度
      timeout: 5000,             // 超时时间
      maximumAge: 0             // 缓存时间
    }
  );

  // 持续监听位置变化
  const watchId = navigator.geolocation.watchPosition(
    (position) => {
      console.log('新位置:', position.coords.latitude, position.coords.longitude);
    },
    (error) => console.error(error),
    { enableHighAccuracy: true }
  );

  // 停止监听
  navigator.geolocation.clearWatch(watchId);
}

7.3.8 WebSocket

// 创建 WebSocket 连接
const socket = new WebSocket('wss://example.com/socket');

// 连接打开
socket.onopen = () => {
  console.log('连接已建立');
  // 发送消息
  socket.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'hello', message: '你好' }));
};

// 接收消息
socket.onmessage = (event) => {
  const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
  console.log('收到消息:', data);
};

// 错误处理
socket.onerror = (error) => {
  console.error('WebSocket 错误:', error);
};

// 连接关闭
socket.onclose = (event) => {
  console.log('连接关闭', event.code, event.reason);
  // 可以尝试重连
  if (!event.wasClean) {
    // 非正常关闭，可以重连
  }
};

// 发送消息
socket.send('Hello Server');

// 关闭连接
socket.close(1000, '正常关闭');

面试考察点：

  • HTML5 新增 API 的使用场景
  • Web Worker 与主线程的通信方式
  • LocalStorage vs SessionStorage vs IndexedDB 的区别
  • History API 与 hash 路由的对比

常见追问：

  • IndexedDB 的适用场景是什么？
  • WebSocket 和 HTTP 长轮询的区别？
  • 如何实现跨标签页通信？

7.4 HTML5 面试真题

7.4.1 DOCTYPE 的作用

<!DOCTYPE html>
<!--
  DOCTYPE（Document Type Declaration）的作用：
  1. 告诉浏览器使用哪种 HTML 规范来解析文档
  2. 触发标准模式（Standards Mode）渲染
  3. 如果不写 DOCTYPE，浏览器会进入 quirks mode（兼容模式）
-->
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <!--
    常见的 DOCTYPE：
    - HTML5: <!DOCTYPE html>
    - HTML4.01: <!DOCTYPE HTML PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD HTML 4.01//EN" "http://www.w3.org/TR/html4/strict.dtd">
    - XHTML: <!DOCTYPE html PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD XHTML 1.0 Strict//EN" "http://www.w3.org/TR/xhtml1/DTD/xhtml1-strict.dtd">
  -->
</head>
</html>

标准模式 vs 兼容模式：

  • 标准模式：按照 W3C 标准解析和渲染页面
  • 兼容模式：模拟旧版浏览器的行为，CSS 盒模型使用 IE5.5 模式

7.4.2 离线存储 (Application Cache vs Service Worker)

// AppCache（已废弃，推荐使用 Service Worker）

// 1. manifest.manifest 文件
CACHE MANIFEST
# version 1.0.0

CACHE:
/index.html
/style.css
/app.js
/logo.png

NETWORK:
/api/*

FALLBACK:
/offline.html

<!-- 2. HTML 引用 -->
<html manifest="manifest.manifest">

// Service Worker（推荐方案）

// 注册 Service Worker
if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
  navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js')
    .then(registration => {
      console.log('Service Worker 注册成功:', registration.scope);
    })
    .catch(error => {
      console.error('Service Worker 注册失败:', error);
    });
}

// sw.js - Service Worker 文件
const CACHE_NAME = 'my-cache-v1';
const urlsToCache = [
  '/',
  '/index.html',
  '/styles.css',
  '/script.js'
];

// 安装阶段 - 缓存资源
self.addEventListener('install', event => {
  event.waitUntil(
    caches.open(CACHE_NAME)
      .then(cache => {
        console.log('Opened cache');
        return cache.addAll(urlsToCache);
      })
  );
});

// 激活阶段 - 清理旧缓存
self.addEventListener('activate', event => {
  event.waitUntil(
    caches.keys().then(cacheNames => {
      return Promise.all(
        cacheNames.map(cacheName => {
          if (cacheName !== CACHE_NAME) {
            return caches.delete(cacheName);
          }
        })
      );
    })
  );
});

// 拦截请求 - 缓存优先
self.addEventListener('fetch', event => {
  event.respondWith(
    caches.match(event.request)
      .then(response => {
        // 命中缓存，直接返回
        if (response) {
          return response;
        }

        // 未命中，发起网络请求
        return fetch(event.request).then(response => {
          // 非同源且是有效响应，不缓存
          if (!response || response.status !== 200 || response.type !== 'basic') {
            return response;
          }

          // 克隆响应并缓存
          const responseToCache = response.clone();
          caches.open(CACHE_NAME)
            .then(cache => {
              cache.put(event.request, responseToCache);
            });

          return response;
        });
      })
  );
});

7.4.3 预加载与懒加载

<!-- 预加载 - 提前加载资源 -->
<!-- 预加载 CSS -->
<link rel="preload" href="styles.css" as="style">

<!-- 预加载 JS -->
<link rel="preload" href="app.js" as="script">

<!-- 预加载字体 -->
<link rel="preload" href="font.woff2" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin>

<!-- 预加载图片（首屏） -->
<link rel="preload" href="hero.jpg" as="image">

<!-- 预取 - 空闲时加载后续资源 -->
<link rel="prefetch" href="next-page.js">
<link rel="prefetch" href="next-page.css">

<!-- 懒加载图片 -->
<img src="placeholder.jpg" data-src="real-image.jpg" loading="lazy" alt="图片">

<!-- 懒加载 iframe -->
<iframe src="content.html" loading="lazy"></iframe>

// 原生懒加载（Intersection Observer）
const images = document.querySelectorAll('img[data-src]');

const imageObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries, observer) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      const img = entry.target;
      img.src = img.dataset.src;
      img.removeAttribute('data-src');
      observer.unobserve(img);
    }
  });
});

images.forEach(img => imageObserver.observe(img));

// 视频懒加载
<video preload="none" poster="poster.jpg">
  <source src="video.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

面试考察点：

  • DOCTYPE 的作用和模式切换
  • 离线存储的演进（AppCache -> Service Worker）
  • 预加载与预取的区别
  • 懒加载的实现方式及原理

常见追问：

  • Service Worker 的生命周期是怎样的？
  • 为什么 AppCache 被废弃？
  • 预加载和预取的使用场景有什么区别？

八、CSS3 新增内容

8.1 CSS3 选择器

8.1.1 属性选择器

/* [attr] - 存在指定属性的元素 */
a[href] { }

/* [attr=value] - 完全匹配 */
input[type="text"] { }

/* [attr~=value] - 空格分隔的词匹配 */
[class~="important"] { }

/* [attr|=value] - 连字符分隔的前缀匹配 */
[lang|="zh"] { }

/* [attr^=value] - 以指定值开头 */
a[href^="https://"] { color: green; }

/* [attr$=value] - 以指定值结尾 */
a[href$=".pdf"] { color: red; }

/* [attr*=value] - 包含指定值 */
a[href*="example"] { }

/* 结合使用 */
input[type="text"][name^="user"] { }

/* 案例 */
.email-link[href^="mailto:"]::before {
  content: "📧 ";
}

.icon-png[src$=".png"] {
  /* PNG 图片样式 */
}

. external[href^="http"]:not([href*="mysite.com"])::after {
  content: " ↗";
}

8.1.2 伪类选择器

/* :nth-child(n) - 第 n 个子元素 */
li:nth-child(3) { }           /* 第三个 */
li:nth-child(odd) { }         /* 奇数 */
li:nth-child(even) { }        /* 偶数 */
li:nth-child(2n) { }          /* 2, 4, 6... */
li:nth-child(2n+1) { }        /* 1, 3, 5... */
li:nth-child(-n+3) { }        /* 前3个 */

/* :nth-of-type(n) - 同类型的第 n 个 */
p:nth-of-type(2) { }          /* 第二个段落 */

/* :not(selector) - 否定伪类 */
input:not([type="submit"]) { }
li:not(.active) { }
:not(.card):not(.header) { }

/* :first-of-type / :last-of-type */
p:first-of-type { }           /* 第一个段落 */
p:last-of-type { }            /* 最后一个段落 */

/* :only-child - 唯一的子元素 */
div:only-child { }            /* 只有一个子元素的 div */

/* :empty - 空元素 */
div:empty { display: none; }

/* :target - 目标伪类（URL #锚点） */
#section1:target { background: #f0f0f0; }

/* :focus-within - 焦点在子元素时 */
.form-group:focus-within {
  border-color: blue;
}

/* :checked - 选中的表单元素 */
input:checked + label { }

/* :valid / :invalid - 表单验证状态 */
input:valid { border-color: green; }
input:invalid { border-color: red; }

/* :required / :optional - 表单必填项 */
input:required { }
input:optional { }

/* 实用案例：表格奇偶行 */
tr:nth-child(even) { background: #f9f9f9; }

/* 实用案例：前三项特殊样式 */
li:nth-child(-n+3) { font-weight: bold; }

8.1.3 伪元素

/* ::before / ::after - 插入内容 */
.card::before {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: 4px;
  background: linear-gradient(to right, #ff6b6b, #4ecdc4);
}

/* ::first-line - 首行 */
p::first-line {
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #333;
}

/* ::first-letter - 首字母 */
p::first-letter {
  font-size: 2em;
  float: left;
  margin-right: 0.1em;
}

/* ::selection - 选中文本 */
::selection {
  background: #3399ff;
  color: white;
}

/* ::placeholder - 占位符样式（需要兼容性前缀） */
input::placeholder {
  color: #999;
}
::-webkit-input-placeholder { }
::-moz-placeholder { }
:-ms-input-placeholder { }

/* 案例：清除浮动 */
.clearfix::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  clear: both;
}

/* 案例：双边框效果 */
.box::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: -5px;
  left: -5px;
  right: -5px;
  bottom: -5px;
  border: 2px solid red;
  z-index: -1;
}

8.1.4 CSS 变量（Custom Properties）

:root {
  /* 定义全局变量 */
  --primary-color: #3399ff;
  --secondary-color: #ff6b6b;
  --font-size-base: 16px;
  --spacing-unit: 8px;
  --border-radius: 4px;
  --transition-speed: 0.3s;

  /* 使用 calc() */
  --container-width: calc(100% - 2 * var(--spacing-unit));
}

body {
  /* 使用变量 */
  font-size: var(--font-size-base);
  color: var(--text-color, #333);  /* 带默认值的变量 */
}

/* 组件级变量 */
.button {
  --btn-bg: var(--primary-color);
  background: var(--btn-bg);
  border-radius: var(--border-radius);
}

.button:hover {
  --btn-bg: var(--secondary-color);
}

/* JavaScript 操作 CSS 变量 */
<script>
// 读取
const styles = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);
const primaryColor = styles.getPropertyValue('--primary-color').trim();

// 设置
document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--primary-color', '#ff0000');

// 删除
document.documentElement.style.removeProperty('--primary-color');
</script>

/* 响应式使用 */
@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
  :root {
    --bg-color: #1a1a1a;
    --text-color: #f0f0f0;
  }
}

面试考察点：

  • 属性选择器的使用场景
  • :nth-child() 和 :nth-of-type() 的区别
  • CSS 变量的优势和使用场景
  • 伪元素和伪类的区别

常见追问：
